jjgaymer☠ 10/08/2020 4:04 PM
AUGUST UPDATE @Partners We have been working hard to release large monthly updates this year and since we went into lockdown these have become a little more challenging to deliver. We also have started to focus heavily on live events in and out of the game including Twitch Drops, Monthly/Weekly Events, Daily Bounties and Custom Servers. As we move through the next 12 months you will see us start to refine these as they become a big focus for how we sustain engagement in SoT and deliver new opportunities for players and creators. In order for us to deliver at the size and quality we expect for a monthly update in August we will not release a Content Update to Sea of Thieves, all planned feature work will now release in September. The Pirate Emporium will also not receive any new content or functionality. We will be communicating to players that our next Content Update will now launch in September with Vaults of the Ancients. This is however still very much under NDA until we do. We are planning on releasing a minor update to retail with our regular bug fixes and support for the pre-planned August Live Events to keep players engaged until Vaults of the Ancients lands in September. This is planned to land on August 19th What does this mean for future updates? This in no way indicates a change to our regular monthly cadence. We are confident in our strategy that monthly releases is the right cadence for maintaining engagement. If you have any questions please do not hesitate to contact me via DM. Thanks again for all your support (edited)

MrJordanAP 5/11/2020 5:30 PM
Hey @Partners ! Back again with another update, this time regarding Obsidian Six Pack codes (again). Myself and @jjgaymer☠ had a catch up about how we deliver codes to you and the following is what we landed on: At the start of every month we will take requests for Obsidian Six Pack codes. If you reach out to me at the start of each month requesting codes (via direct message preferably), I'll give you 20 codes for the month. If you don't reach out I'll assume that you don't want these wonderful codes... The reason for this is so that we can all get the most out of the codes so be sure to reach out if you want to get your list! I'll also be looking at taking care of the weekly stream schedule so keep your eye out for messages regarding this over the next few weeks. Hope everyone is doing well, I know everything is a bit all over the place in the world right know but know if you ever need anything feel free to reach out ✌️

jjgaymer☠ 13/11/2020 2:50 PM
Hey @Partners, if you were part of the call or had looked at the notes you'll remember we talked about our next big step, Seasons. We know this is a significant change for the game and the community and we want to make sure we get it right. With that said we are taking a little more time and moving Season 1 to January 2021. Starting off the new year with a new release cadence for the game. We are still planning on doing two updates, one in November and one in December. November will be more of a quality of life update and December will introduce a new live event in the Festival of Giving. These two update will be much smaller than what you have come to expect over throughout the year and I want to set expectations accordingly. As mentioned in the call we will also be doing a video that explains our new plan for updating the game in Seasons and some of the content we talked to you about in the call. This is scheduled for release ahead of Seasons to Insiders next week to make sure it's not leaked through there. We still have a bunch of stuff planned in and out of the game throughout the next two months so plenty of things to look forward to. As always we will make sure we get you assets and BROLL in line with any content you want to create closer to the release of Season 1 in January. Thanks for all your patience on this.

jjgaymer☠ 20/11/2020 11:37 AM
Hey @Partners, Please welcome @AceNimrod! Josh is our Community Management Intern and he is going to be helping out around here with triage of bug and feedback. A little while back we discussed that there were concerns that feedback and bugs were being posted and it often felt like you were screaming into a void. Josh is going to be setting a process in which all your bugs and feedback will be centralised and have status tags on them. That way you can check where your bugs or feedback currently sit. He will also be posting in here the reports that go to Rare Leadership to give you all a view of the kinds of information leadership see and also for folks who might not be able to spend as much time sifting through the Discord it will be a good recap. Thank you for all the bugs and feedback so far and I look forward to seeing how this new process can help.

AceNimrod 3/12/2020 4:02 PM
Hey @Partners! It has been a little while and I have been squirreled away in the back doing some work on making the bug reporting and visibility situation a little better for you all. So here I am with an update on where we currently are, along with some information on exactly HOW we fix bugs, which should hopefully give you all a bit of context on why some bugs may get fixed and others are a bit more tricky!
2
2
4:03 PM
Hope you are all prepared for some walls of text
4:03 PM
So without further ado, let’s get into it! Firstly, the current plan is that We would like to trial using a Trello board specifically within the Partner Program. We have a robust bug tracking system on our end, but unfortunately there is no way for us to give you any visibility on that due to a myriad of reasons, especially those involving data privacy. This board will be our way of giving you more visibility into our bug fixing process. We understand that it can be frustrating when it feels like your bug reports are being thrown into the wind without any real acknowledgement that they have even been received let alone actively worked on. The hope here is that when a bug is reported by you all, we will be able to give some form of visibility on where we are with reproducing or fixing that bug, which should help you feel better knowing we are seeing and working on these bugs as we get them.
4:06 PM
But what exactly is needed for us to fix a bug? This Is where I want to outline how we go about fixing bugs, to give you all an idea of what you can do to help the process along as best it can. When we receive a bug report, the most important factor in that bug being addressed is our ability to consistently replicate the bug’s occurrence. This is for a multitude of reasons, not the least of which being the fact that it allows us to actually understand what it causing the bug, and what we might be able to try to fix it. It then allows us to test that fix reliably as we know we can reproduce the bug well enough to see if the fix worked. To this end, the most important thing you can give us when reporting a bug is specific context and reproduction steps. If you have managed to clip the bug in action, amazing. Even better if you can reproduce it yourself. This gives us a lot of information that you might not think was important but can often be the difference between consistent reproduction and a complete inability to reproduce at all. The most useful thing you could give us is a link to the stream it happened in with a timestamp of roughly when it happened, as this provides us with the context of what was happening in the game world in the leadup to the bug happening, which could be essential for reproduction. If you don’t have a video clip of the bug, you can still make the report! However: The most vital thing if you are only providing a written report of a bug is a concrete rundown of exactly what you were doing and where in a step-by-step process. Where were you standing on your ship? What area of the map were you in? Were there any world events going on at the time? Were any crewmates or enemies dead on your ship at the time? These are all things that may not immediately be obvious causes of a problem but can often be the one thing we are missing to reproduce a particularly nasty bug, so as much detail as possible is key.
4:06 PM
Even with all this information, sometimes a bug may be inherently tied to a core system of the game, and even with the ability to reproduce it consistently, if the bug happens to be due to interactions between core systems of the game, this could require months of dedicated work to try and resolve, so sometimes being able to replicate it doesn’t mean the fix is by any means easy to implement. However, we will always endeavour to try and fix as many bugs as we can to the best of our ability.
4:07 PM
Once we have this info, what’s next? When this is all set up, we will be doing daily sweeps of the bug reporting channel. Once we spot your bug report in this channel, we will use this reaction ( ) to acknowledge that we have seen it. We will then send the report off to our customer support team, who will help join the dots if this is an existing bug or create a new ticket if it’s a fresh one. Once we have this information back, we will update and add to the Trello board. We will then delete your bug report from the reporting channel. This is to keep things visibly clear which bugs have been sent over and updated on the Trello to avoid double reports. However, we will of course still have all the info you sent us, and the necessary details will appear in the Trello.
4:07 PM
Hopefully this gives you all an idea of where we are right now on making Bug reporting clearer and more efficient! Keep an eye out in coming weeks for when the Trello board hopefully appears, as it will be your Go-to place to check if other partners are experiencing similar bugs, and to help get your feedback assigned to the right place.
4:07 PM
Cheers!
12
2
RareCSM - Rob 4/12/2020 10:50 AM
Hey @Partners - I have been looking at ways to help out with the Streamsniping issues that some of you have by changing your Gamertag on your main account, while keeping it safe so that no one else can take it - so if any of you are interested in this, let me know. Basically, you would: 1) Create an alt Xbox account name with your streamer Gamertag in it, something like KaidaWrathPP, PhuzzyPP, etc is fine 2) DM me the alt Gamertag along with the Gamertag you currently use 3) It will then take a day or two and the alt account name would be switched onto your main account, and your Streamer name is then safely parked on the alt so that no one else can take it After the switch takes place, I can then freely give you Gamertag name changes as and when you need them. If you ever leave the partner program, you can either keep everything as it is or, request your Streamer name be moved back to your main account again. Please bear in mind though, that the parked Gamertag on the alt account cannot be moved around easily by us, it’s a very manual process for the Xbox platform team to modify accounts in this way, and it is not something that would normally even be considered, this is purely a favor to Rare to help out in this way. If this is something you are interested in doing, just DM me your main account name and the alt you created, and I will get them set up next week. (edited)

18
jjgaymer☠ 23/12/2020 3:30 PM
Hey @Partners! With this being the last working day of the year here at Rare, and what a year it has been, I wanted to take some time to talk about where we have been, where we are and where we are going. 2020 has been hard. I am personally very grateful that I continue to have a job and that I am in good health when so many have been impacted. I know this can be hard on individuals and families and I want you all to know that we are here to support where we can. I never want the Partner Programme to feel like a pressure for any of you and if you need time or space please let me know. But there has been a lot to celebrate! 2020 has been the biggest year for Sea of Thieves to date and that in no small part has been accelerated by all you amazing people. Our numbers have been up across everything and the launch of Steam has seen us really expand our PC audience and diversify our player base from countries across the globe who may not have previously been able to access the game. This in turn means that our viewing numbers have been on the rise and we have more content creators from more countries experiencing the game for the first time and bringing in fresh new faces to the seas.
3:30 PM
This game continues to be a project of passion for the team here at Rare and I want to thank you all for your support as we continue to navigate these uncharted waters and for celebrating the highs with us and for having our backs during the lows. We know we have work to do and your feedback is super valuable. We expect 2021 to be even bigger than this year. Seasons will be our new foundation for delivering content to the game and will create a sustainable way for us to keep players engaged. Custom Servers and our plans to give you access to the toybox will push forward in a big way next year and I can’t wait to see what you create and what new types of content start popping up. We are putting more investment into Sea of Thieves than we ever have and there will be some time at the start of the year where we are going to have to ask you to trust us and that we promise what is coming will be worth the wait.
7
3:30 PM
For the Partner Programme itself we are going to continue to see things change and grow we will have new processes put in places for bugs and feedback in early 2021 and we are going to see more new partners join like we have over the past few weeks. We also have big plans for Sea of Thieves on Twitch with more places to highlight Partners and the creator community, the addition of Twitch Drops being turned on 24/7 with an RNG element and the Partner Directory on the seaofthieves.com site. All in all I think we have a lot to look forward to in 2021 and I hope that we continue to see the amazing content we have come to expect from your channels and also the incredible support you have given each other this year. Its humbling to see so many of you give up your time to share experiences or just lend an ear to each other. You are all amazing! Lastly I will be here checking in over the holidays so I am not completely gone so if you have any issues please do reach out. Keep up the great work Crew have a great holiday period and I will see you on the seas.

MrJordanAP 5/01/2021 10:42 PM
Ahoy @Partners! Tomorrow we will be doing essential maintenance on our servers between the hours of 10:00am and 12:00pm GMT. We're aware that this will be the last day of Twitch Drops so may cause some disruption, but we're confident this won't take too long. Just a heads up, we have seen over the past few months that there has been an issue regarding codes that have been given to you as Partners, specifically Obsidian Six Pack codes. A number of these codes have been stated as "redeemed" and is being investigated. After tomorrow morning we are going to temporarily hold fire on delivering any more codes until we find out more. If you have any issues with any codes after then, just let me know and we can get it sorted out. Apologies on the delay delivering codes also, I'll be working super hard to get them all out tomorrow morning so you all have them for the month! I won't be in after lunchtime GMT tomorrow until Thursday as I'll be moving house but I'll do as much as I can in the morning before I have to go.

jjgaymer☠ 8/01/2021 1:44 PM
Hey @Partners! LAST CALL! to folks about filling out the Partner Directory form attached to the post a few above ^^ We’ve got a WIP for the partner directory – there’s a couple of stylings to tweak on the tags but this should be enough of an overview. • Sorting will be by who’s live first then randomised offline to keep positioning fair amongst the partners • If there are multiple partners live at once (that fills the front page) then the ticker tape will scroll the names of partners who are currently live • We’ve taken a ‘load more’ button rather than pagination approach to keep this fair to the partners rather than an absolute fixed page positioning We have an expanded bio page in the works but that’s with the UI designer to create a full mock-up. If you could put out a reminder for content from the partners that would be great. Also a gentle reminder to the partners to take extra care when filling in the form, we won’t be able to cherry pick/tidy up the responses. For example some partners have selected multiple tags where the maximum allowed is 3, this is to define the content and make filtering easier for users visiting the page. If this is filled in incorrectly we will take the first 3 tags chosen for example PVP / PVE / FUNNY We’re looking to have all the responses back by the 15th Jan (edited)

RareCSM - Rob 13/01/2021 3:28 PM
@Partners it may be worth turning off your Xbox invites while streaming today if you have them on - we have someone from the Bandits that is actively spamming Xbox friend requests with racist names to try and get them onto streams - I know for sure they are trying to invite @Smexi @Spar and @AsylumGC8 so they will be going after others I am sure. The easiest way to Disable, is to press the "Windows Key + G" to open up the Xbox Gamebar, then go to settings and Notifications and turn everything off: https://www.windowscentral.com/how-disable-windows-10-xbox-game-bar-pop-ups-and-tips
How to disable Windows 10 Xbox Game Bar pop-ups, tips, and notifica...

AceNimrod 18/01/2021 2:14 PM
Hey @everyone! The time has come, and we are finally ready to introduce you all to your new bug tracking Trello board! Below you’ll find two links, one to the Trello board and the other to a video explanation of how the process works if you want a TL:DR of the system, although it is fairly simple:
2:15 PM
New bug reports made by yourselves are posted in the ‘bugs here please’ Discord text channel. To acknowledge I have seen it, I will respond with a and then send the bugs you’ve reported that day off to our Customer Support team, to have an official report logged in our system. Once the official report has been assigned a ticket number [those digits at the start of each bug on the board] I will add your report to the Trello board. The sections are as follows:
  • About section contains an FAQ of most common questions and a guide to the tags marking each report.
  • Reported issues houses every report made that isn’t awaiting a fix or has already been fixed. The status of each bug is denoted by its tags.
  • Pending fixes is for any bugs awaiting fix implementations in the next retail release.
  • Recent fixes contains all bugs that have had fixes implemented in the latest retail release.
  • Fix archive is used for any bugs that have been fixed in previous patches.
  • Patch notes will be home to an archive of the patch notes for each release.
  • End of each day I will be wiping the ‘bugs here please’ chat for easier visibility.
 (edited)
8
2:15 PM
Have a poke around and feel free to drop me a message if you have any questions not covered in the FAQ! I would recommend watching the video for a slightly more in-depth explanation of how things work. I’d also like to reiterate that this board is strictly under NDA and only for Partners, so please do not share these links anywhere outside of the Partner Programme Discord Server, and do not show them on-stream. https://microsofteur-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/g/personal/jomcmurt_microsoft_com/Er3oLhAWG2FBte6JdzOXuGQBUgwAYr9hP6081JdSUKBvQQ?e=pF2Ypp https://trello.com/b/ITV6X7F4/artemis-tracker
Trello
Organize anything, together. Trello is a collaboration tool that organizes your projects into boards. In one glance, know what's being worked on, who's working on what, and where something is in a process.

Twitch Drops - Season 1: @Partners As promised we have our first set of drops for Season 1. These will run from Friday 5th of February - Tuesday 9th February and will earn you items from the Gilded Phoenix Set Yup that's right, this is the set that is tied to the Creator Crew and Partners. I will make sure you have marketing materials in plenty of time for the announce on Wednesday 3rd of Feb. We wanted this time to make sure that it was close enough to launch to still have the hype but far enough away that if we have any issues with the build that there is time to adjust before we engage you all and your audiences. As a teaser here are the first 5 items you can expect to give away. Twitch Drops Season 1 - Drop 1 Feb Friday 5th - Gilded Phoenix Banjo Saturday 6th - Gilded Phoenix Drum Sunday 7th - Gilded Phoenix Speaking Trumpet Monday 8th - Gilded Phoenix Concertina Tuesday 9th - Gilded Phoenix HurdyGurdy Season 1 - Drop 2 Feb Friday 19th - Gilded Phoenix Shovel Saturday 20th - Gilded Phoenix Spyglass Sunday 21st - Shuffle Dance Emote Monday 22nd - Gilded Phoenix Pocket Watch Tuesday 23rd - Gilded Phoenix Fishing Rod Season 1 - Drop 3 March Friday 19th - Gilded Phoenix Bucket Saturday 20th - Gilded Phoenix Lantern Sunday 21st - Hornpipe Dance Emote Monday 22nd - Gilded Phoenix Compass Tuesday 23rd - Gilded Phoenix Tankard (edited)

jjgaymer☠ 28/01/2021 2:58 PM
@Partners I have seen some confusion over terminology with Season 1 which is completely understandable given how close it is to other games systems but with a twist so thought I would put this glossary up for you to have a look it: Season: Introduced by Content Update Lasts ~3 months New content, rewards, progression goals and live events over the period. Pirate Log: New Progression System Renown and Deeds 100 rewards to earn Completely free to all players Plunder Pass: Paid add on Get 11 additional Emporium items Heavily discounted rate but need to be unlocked through play Available the following Season in the Emporium to purchase individually Noticing some folks referring to the new progression system as the Plunder Pass but that is the paid bundle. Reach out if you have any questions.
jjgaymer☠ 18/02/2021 10:56 AM
Hey @Partners Giving this another ping for anyone who might be interested but missed it. As you may have seen on on February 18th we will be launching the "Sails of Hope" in collaboration with Great Ormond Street Hospital here in the UK to raise money for their wonderful charity. GOSH have reached out to us asking if there is anyone in here who would be interested in doing anything to help support these efforts? I know you all do such great work for charity and we are currently putting together an information pack for you all. If you would like to do something or find out more about the charity please hit me up with a DM. Thanks again for all your support. I have the doc that I can ping to you now that should help with links to Tiltify etc. I will also let GOSH know of any streams you are doing to support if you ping them over as they would love to amplify on their channels.

AceNimrod 20/02/2021 12:16 PM
@Partners Quick announcement to let you all know that we have a team working this weekend to resolve the root cause of the crash issues that have been experienced Thursday's release. Thanks for your patience while we've worked on this, and we hope to find a permanent fix ASAP. In the meantime, as a temporary stopgap the crash seems to have ties to the amount of loot on a ship when loading into the game - so if you need to have friends join your crew or a crew member needs to reconnect after a D/C, selling your current loot haul to leave the ship as empty as possible should mitigate this issue until a proper fix can be implemented. (edited)

@Partners Hi all, further to Josh's message earlier: a fix for the crash issue has now been released for all platforms. A small download will be required - but once you've updated your game, you'll be free to sail as usual. Thanks for your patience!
4
AceNimrod 22/02/2021 5:23 PM
Hey @everyone, As many of you are highly invested Sea of Thieves players, I am sure many of you have been on the latest Insider build and have come across the new Glitterbeard Easter egg that we placed in the game. We created this Easter egg to honour a good friend to many and great developer at Rare who is unfortunately no longer with us, and it's something that we really wish to be something both special and beautiful for the players to discover on their own when it finally makes its way into the live build. As such, we think a lot of the Joy of this Easter egg lies in its discovery, and that perhaps detailed guides and walkthroughs might detract from the experience. So just this once we were hoping that we could try and leave some of the magic for the players, and lean away from detailed Wiki documentation or how-to's. Of course, you are welcome to enjoy this Easter egg together with your communities, and we hope they love it as much as we do.

jjgaymer☠ 25/02/2021 1:52 PM
Hey @Partners! The new Partner Directory is here! https://www.seaofthieves.com/partner-directory Head on over and check it out. FYI it shows who is live now (in order they came online) but is randomised for those who are offline. Go check it out!

Discover more about the streamers and creators in the Sea of Thieves Partner Programme and find them on Twitch, YouTube and social channels!

AceNimrod 26/02/2021 4:29 PM
Hello @Partners! Just a quick one from me. We've recently been tightening up the Official Sea of Thieves Discord ahead of all the exciting things we are going to be doing as we continue to grow the game. We've seen tremendous growth across all ages in our community, so ensuring the Discord is family friendly is a high priority for us. As such, we've had to crack down on the TOS for the server, and one of these rules involves Discord's "Status message" feature. Right now, it is against our TOS to use this status system for any form of self promotion (excluding streaming mode), and to display any vulgarity, racism, toxicity etc. We understand the benefit of using self-promotion statuses in other Discord servers. So we feel that it might perhaps be easier if you wish to have more freedom around using Statuses, to leave the Official Discord to keep everything above board. If you wish to remain inside the Official Discord however, we would like to ask that you make sure your Status messages are compliant with these terms. This includes attempts to bypass the bot filters for vulgarity or links (such as spelling out D I C C) Please be aware that from Monday, moderators will begin tidying this space, so you have this weekend to make any changes or leave the server if you wish before they do the cleanup. If you receive any notifications of muting or being warned, it will most likely be related to this! Thanks a lot! (edited)
16
MrJordanAP 1/03/2021 11:16 AM
Happy March @Partners! As we're now at the start of the month, be sure to drop me a message to grab your monthly codes to giveaway, 20 Obsidian Six Pack codes and an Obsidian Capstan. These are to last the month so be sure to space these out if you can and be sure to let me know if you have any issues with these codes. All the best! ✌️

MrJordanAP 8/03/2021 1:55 PM
Ahoy @Partners! Just wanted to say that this will be the last week that we will be distributing codes to giveaway to your viewers/community, so be sure to get your requests in if you haven't already. This DOES NOT mean you will not be able to give away Six Packs or Capstans to your communities anymore. We are implementing a new way to distribute Six Packs and Capstans to giveaway winners which we're looking to start next month, so keep an eye out towards the end of the month for an update on that! Let me know if you have any questions/need any codes ✌️ Jord

jjgaymer☠ 15/03/2021 11:50 AM
MONDAY MORNING UPDATE Hey @everyone! I thought I might start posting on a Monday morning with some updates on what's going on to keep everyone up to date. We have a tonne of stuff happening at the moment so I thought I would try and get it all in one place. Firstly, I would like to welcome aboard the 19 new Partners who recently joined the programme from around the world taking us to a grand total of 109 Sea of Thieves Partners. Combined you had 4.1 million watch hours of Sea of Thieves on Twitch in the last 30 days! • This week we have the final update for Season 1 which brings with it: o more items to the Pirate Emporium (Sea of Sands Set) o more Dark Adventurer items for Legends o more items to Outposts (Venemous Kraken Set, Distinguished Admiral Set and the Legacy Event Cosmetics from Festival of Fishing) o and a bunch of bugs fixes and QoL improvements o Vault Raiders Live Event from March 25th See below for an early look at the WIP patch notes. Remember folks these are very much under NDA please DO NOT SHARE! • For anyone who missed it I have reattached the Partner Directory document. If you missed it the first time around or you are new to the Partner Programme then please fill this out and send it over to the Creators@seaofthieves.com email address. Please take a look at the Partner Directory over at www.seaofthieves.com/partner-directory if you want inspiration as to what you might put in the boxes. (edited)

11:51 AM
• Twitch Drops will also be running this Friday the 19th -24th from 10am GMT. All assets including Renders, Banners and B-Roll can be found here: https://microsofteur-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/personal/jomcmurt_microsoft_com/Documents/SoT_Partner_Assets/02_Twitch_Drops/2103_Season_One_Twitch_Drops_Part_3?csf=1&web=1&e=PyHdOV @Absolutepixel has also supplied some amazing animated banners here: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/17A4MXkiKvGTqaoHLLSgH2KMUAEn_bTAT?usp=sharing If you cannot get access to the OneDrive link please contact @Madlink with an up to date email address. • Lastly if you have recently changed your Gamertag can you please let us know as we have noticed a few of you have, please reach out via DM and we can get that changed over for you as you may end up missing out on your Ancient Coins on Thursday.

AceNimrod 15/03/2021 3:47 PM
Hello @Partners! I was hoping you could all provide me with a bit of info about the current "big issue" bugs you've been experiencing in recent months. We want to be sure that when we are allocating time to bug fixing and stability, that these kind of issues are being prioritised, so now is your chance to put forward your collective "top 5" bugs. If you want to contribute to this list, there is a new text chat named "top-5-bugs-roundup" for to add your thoughts to using the template below: My Top 5 Bugs: Please try to describe the bug in one sentence. We do not need repro steps or examples. If already logged use Trello number. Please try to describe the bug in one sentence. We do not need repro steps or examples. If already logged use Trello number. Please try to describe the bug in one sentence. We do not need repro steps or examples. If already logged use Trello number. Please try to describe the bug in one sentence. We do not need repro steps or examples. If already logged use Trello number. Please try to describe the bug in one sentence. We do not need repro steps or examples. If already logged use Trello number. The deadline for this feedback to be collected in is end of week (21.03.21) Thanks!

jjgaymer☠ 22/03/2021 11:45 AM
Good Morning @Partners, Monday Morning Update time! Hope you have all been enjoying Twitch Drops this weekend. • Our next call will be Wednesday 24th March at 11am GMT/ 4am PDT for one hour. I know that one is quite early/late for some folks so I hope you can make it. If not, we will post the notes taken afterwards to keep you all up to date. I would also recommend jumping onto Insiders before then as that may give you some more context as to some of the things we will be talking about and may help with feedback. • Twitch Drops Season 2 will be in two batches and will be for the Gilded Phoenix Clothing Set. These will drop 23rd -27th April and 7th – 11th May. • For the launch of Season 2 we are also trailing a different set of Twitch Drops as we would like to measure the impact that they have. From the 16th -18th April we will be allowing everyone access to Twitch Drops. These will be older items from the Obsidian Set and will be stacked on viewing time as opposed to the 20min drops. There are no plans to make this the standard moving forward but depending on the outcomes this may be another tool we can use as marketing push alongside the Partner Drops for special events. • One more call to anyone looking for their details to be put up on the Partner Directory. We haven’t had many of the new Partners come forward with their applications so please do take the time to fill in the form and send it over to creators@seaofthieves.com , cheers.
14
MrJordanAP 1/04/2021 2:29 PM
Hey hey @Partners, As promised, I’m here to outline the new system we’re putting in place for you giving out cosmetics to your communities! A lot of you have messaged over the months having issues with codes appearing as redeemed and this new process will remove that as a problem. Instead of giving out codes at the start of each month, we will now be applying cosmetics to winner’s accounts directly. What this will require from you as Partners will be a list of gamertags once a week to send over to me directly. If you are all able to get me this list by the start of Thursday every week at the latest (9:00 am BST) then I will be able to get them all applied on that day. If I don’t get the names by that time, then unfortunately they may have to wait until the following week (if one or two slip through the net then I can pick those up if you message me). I ask that we still stick to the number previously mentioned, 20 Obsidian Six pack and one Obsidian Capstan for each partner per month, as to maintain the value of these cosmetics. I will be keeping a record of the gamertags and who requested them, so will know how many are given away but shouldn’t really be many more than 5 names per week. (edited)
2:29 PM
We’re aware that there may be some issues with things like misspelled gamertags or winners giving the wrong gamertags. If this is the case, I will reach out to you privately to work out getting the prize to the winner. Be aware that some people may be upset by this change as we can only assume some people would like to sell these codes or give them to friends. If the winner of your giveaway already has this then we won’t be offering an alternative prize, so be sure to let them know to only enter if they do not own the cosmetic in question. As a side note, we are looking to switch out from the Obsidian cosmetics in the not-so-distant future and will be giving Partners a number of cosmetics from a wider set to give away, exclusively obtainable from watching your streams. Players will only be able to complete this set by watching your streams and winning your giveaways. I can’t say much more at this point, but we’ll have an update for you about this in the next call! Drop me a message if you have any questions about this. Appreciate your faces! ✌️ (edited)

MrJordanAP 1/04/2021 4:09 PM
Hey @Partners! One last thing before we're away for the Easter weekend. Just to clarify, this system will replace the codes entirely. Codes already given out will continue to work, but we won't be giving them out anymore. When getting the Gamertags from users, make sure that it matches their in-game name if they are playing on Steam. Steam usernames WILL NOT WORK. Xbox Gamertags for Xbox players will work just fine. All the best!!!

jjgaymer☠ 6/04/2021 10:00 AM
Good Morning @Partners! Tuesday morning update for you here since Monday was a Bank Holiday here in the UK. Just a couple things to touch on, its pretty light this week. • We are delaying the Obsidian Twitch Drops that would have gone ahead on the 16th - 18th April, these were planned to be open to everyone and will be going ahead at some point during Summer. Both normal Season 2 Twitch Drops will go ahead as planned on the 23rd – 27th April and 7th – 11th May. Item lists and renders of these will be with you this week. • Season 2 will launch on 15th of April. If you are interested in giving feedback on features, please jump into the Insiders build and test out some of the things coming. • Exploit videos. While this may be a bigger topic of discussion, I would like to draw a line in the sand here. As Partners we would expect you to try to showcase the best of Sea of Thieves and no matter how insignificant the exploit, we would rather you didn’t create content (VOD or Streaming) that highlights or passes that knowledge on. Our Partners are an extension of our brand values and that shouldn’t and therefore should not always be looking to push as far as possible before breaking the rules. I’m sure your endlessly creative minds can come up with other exciting content to produce to excite your players without resorting to low hanging fruit. If there are exploits you feel should be addressed, please continue to make us aware of them. • KEEP ON SMASHING IT! Numbers from Season 1 Twitch Drops were massive! You all are awesome and have managed do more than 50% more than the previous three combined! • Also, for those of you who want to catch a bargain here is this months 25% off the merch store code: SOTPP425 (April) (edited)

Good Morning @Partners! Monday Morning Update time. This week we have the launch of Season 2 and we hope you're all excited to dig your teeth into this juicy update. To sweeten the deal we have a few goodies for you too! • I won't type it all out again but please do check out the announcement above for details on Season 2 Twitch Drops. • We thought since you have been extra awesome we would add 1000 extra ancient coins to your balance at the start of each Season so you can purchase the Plunder Pass without having to use any of your existing coins. That means you have extra left over to buy those goodies from the Emporium. • We also thought "Why not share the love?". So we will be giving you 3 Plunder Pass's to give away in the first week of the update. From April 15th you will have the opportunity to give away 3 Plunder Pass's to your community. Please use the existing system and make sure you get the Gamertags of the winners over to Jordan by Wednesday the 21st. All Gamertags will be applied in a batch after this date, this will not be done on an ad-hoc basis. MrJordanAP 4/05/2021 3:08 PM
Ahoy @Partners! I have something to share with you all and wanted to get a feel for those who would be interested. We are going to be supporting ESL and their digital Dreamhack event named Dreamhack Beyond later this year which will be held entirely online through a website they have created and through their accompanying streams. They have asked if any of our partners would be interested in taking part in their Sea of Thieves events, potentially in both the build up to and during the event. To get a good idea of your interest, be sure to react to this announcement and also drop a message in the #collabs to let me know you’d be interested in joining in! The actual event takes place from July 24th-31st with potential for events before then in the build up. Things could still change with this, so I’ll keep you all in the loop when I know more. (We haven’t publicly announced any involvement in this so please be sure not to talk about this anywhere!) Thanks a bunch!!! ✌️

13
jjgaymer☠ 12/05/2021 10:09 AM
Hey @Partners, I wanted to take some time to go through what I feel is a growing concern for me in the Discord server: the tone and lack of professional etiquette from some Partners. Before I get into this, I do want to say that thankfully these occurrences are few and far between for the moment, but also want to make it clear that this type of emotive, unprofessional dialogue is not welcome within the Discord. I understand that folks who are in here have a huge amount of passion for the game and that passion can manifest itself as aggressive venting within the channels here. This, however, is not the place to vent. We don’t shy away from reading constructive feedback, bug reports, interesting new ideas or requests to change features or processes. In fact we often look to you as a channel who speak not just for yourselves, but your communities - and by extension, ours - too. I look at even just the recent investigation into ship respawn distance as a positive change brought forward by our ongoing dialogue with you, and we're making further steps to formalise your feedback track into the studio and ensure your voices are heard.
10:09 AM
However, more and more I am seeing “I hate…”, “This is fu***ing annoying” or “It’s just lazy…” and it’s not constructive or insightful to read - it's painful and often incredibly reductive. It’s not motivating or welcoming for other Partners who strive to create a positive social environment and wish to share their feedback with balance and nuance, and I know it can be particularly hard to read for the dev team, who pour their heart into everything we try and do. With that said: from here on in, we will be creating a new role within the Discord. If we feel that people continually fail to meet the level of professional etiquette we strive to achieve in the server, this “read only” role will be applied. If those with that role continue to direct nonconstructive and negative comments towards us over other channels, we may even revisit their Partnered status. Feedback isn't always going to be glowing - and that we fully accept - but it must always be respectful, and we won't tolerate that line being crossed multiple times. We want the Discord to be a positive social space everyone feels like they can speak up, share ideas and collaborate. A place where everyone feels excited for the possibility of what Sea of Thieves and the Partner Programme can bring to your communities and businesses.

MrJordanAP 14/05/2021 3:25 PM
Hey @Partners! Thanks everyone who expressed their interest in the ESL events I previously mentioned. The team over at ESL have expressed interest in starting events with yourselves soon and have extended an invitation to a Discord server so they can start discussing the first event and coordinate with yourselves. For those who were concerned about being busy at the end of July when the Dreamhack event is set to take place, the goal for ESL is to begin running regular events soon so we’re keen to get the ball rolling on this, and don’t be discouraged if you’re unable to join the first event as there are plans for many more to take place. ESL are looking for not only people to compete, but also for people with casting experience to take part too (I know a good number of you are SUPER talented at this so definitely let Torbin from ESL know if this is something you’re interested in). This will be the first Sea of Thieves event that they have run and are keen to improve each and every one that they run over the coming months, so be sure to give them any feedback or ideas you may have. I’ll be in this Discord just to keep track of how everything is going but this will mostly be in the hands of ESL from this point forward with myself supporting, so be sure to message me with any concerns or topics you wish to discuss about this. Following the large number of you who were interested, I’ll be leaving the link to the Discord here for any of our partners who are interested to join but I ask that you don’t give this out to anyone outside of the Partner Programme (unless given permission to do so by the ESL/Dreamhack admins of the Discord). When you get into the Discord, be sure to add and message Torbin#0001 stating that you are a Sea of Thieves Partner so he can give you the appropriate role in the server! ESL DISCORD LINK: https://discord.gg/UMWY4gf Have a great weekend all!!! ❤️

AceNimrod 2/06/2021 1:28 PM
Greetings @Partners! We've been having a discussion about the current categories used to separate discussions in this Discord, and thanks to some lovely suggestions by @Shillianth we are going to do a reshuffle and tidy things up a bit. Please do not be alarmed as things are chopping and changing, we may do some further reshuffling throughout the week as we try some things out but hopefully these new changes will make things a bit more cohesive for everyone! I will also be introducing a new Bot to help with tracking your TOP 5 bugs each update for more regular check-ins. Hopefully this will make voting on your top 5 a breeze and we can start doing it once per update. I'll write out some notes on how to use the bot when it's all set up, but in the meantime I hope you all have a lovely week Streaming and creating content!

AceNimrod 2/06/2021 3:39 PM
@Partners There is now a "TOP 5 MAY-JUNE 21" channel in the bug reporting category where we will start using a more regular recording of your top 5 bugs. This poll will be open until next Thursday, 10th June at 12pm BST. After that point, I will archive the thread and tally the totals for our next report. jjgaymer☠ 11/06/2021 2:57 PM
THIS INFORMATION IS COVERED BY THE LEGALLY BINDING NDA (NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT) THAT YOU SIGNED. PLEASE DO NOT SHARE. Hi @Partners , We hope you’re as excited as we are about the upcoming Xbox and Bethesda Games Showcase this weekend, airing Sunday June 13 at 10am PT/6pm BST! As we approach an exciting weekend of reveals and announcements, we have something to ask of you: Official Sea of Thieves Partners, we would love to give you the opportunity to be part of a video we’re planning in collaboration with Xbox to share after the show. We hope that you will be watching with your communities and sharing in some of the epic announcements that are made there anyway. However, this would involve you recording your live, genuine reaction to the broadcast so we can create a compilation of reactions and moments to share with the gaming community. All we’d ask is that you please stick to the below set of guidelines, just so we can make sure whatever you’re sending will be appropriate for use. • Record your stream locally, 1080p as a minimum video size. • If possible, wear headphones so the audio we get of you reacting is clean. • Please make sure you don’t have any visible logos or items belonging to other IP in the shot! Should we want to use your footage, that’ll cause us some issues. • Try not to swear! Please keep it as clean as possible – we won’t be able to use your footage if you’re dropping f-bombs. (edited)
2:58 PM
If you could submit these as soon as possible after the show, that would be wonderful – the deadline for submissions will be 15th June, so we’d appreciate it if you could post a link to your video in the #video-submissions channel. If you’re not comfortable with posting it to the Discord server, then please just drop a message and a file transfer link to any of the Rare staff here – we can make sure it gets to the right place for you. And of course, if you decide not to take part, then we hope you tune in and enjoy some of the amazing announcements lined up for the show!
34
19
7
4
jjgaymer☠ 13/06/2021 5:21 PM
Ahoy @Partners ! I hope you are all enjoying the Microsoft and Bethesda E3 Showcase! As you may have just seen, we have had a secret project in the works for quite some time now, and I apologise that I could not share the details of this surprise with you all any sooner. However, now that it is finally out in the open I would like to say I hope you are all ready for something very special. For those of you who might’ve missed it, here’s what we've just revealed... https://youtu.be/kIcg4VQJXB8 Split across five incredible Tall Tales packed with secrets and side-quests, Sea of Thieves: A Pirate’s Life sees Captain Jack Sparrow sailing in from beyond the horizon to sweep players into an epic new adventure. Free Jack from his prison and witness the power of the world’s greatest Pirate Treasure, which he just so happens to have stolen, before joining him on an unforgettable quest to stop dark forces from dominating this pirate paradise. This lovingly crafted story will be available to play alone or with a crew, and will be a free update for all players with the arrival of Sea of Thieves: Season Three on June 22. We’ll share more information as we approach the launch, so stay tuned and keep an eye on that folder as more assets are added!
Sea of Thieves
Sea of Thieves: A Pirate's Life - Announcement Trailer

jjgaymer☠ 14/06/2021 8:36 AM
Hey @Partners! What a day that was! I hope you all enjoyed watching the reveal of A Pirates Life at the Xbox/Bethesda Showcase last night as much as we enjoyed sharing it with you. I have loved watching all your reaction videos, thank you to everyone who took part. You are all understandably excited and I am sure will want to prepare your schedules and content for launch on the 22nd June and beyond. However, there are a few things I want to cover here that make this launch a little different than the others in terms of how we an approach it from a Partner Programme side. For A Pirates's Life we are working in collaboration with Disney which means an approval process for all content and how it is used. This means that we won't be taking asset requests in the channel for this update as this cannot be done on an ad-hoc basis. As we move to launch and beyond however, you can find approved assets dropping regularly on Xbox Wire that you should feel free to use however you like. Secondly, I have created a channel #a-pirates-life where we will be chatting about anything to do with this update. There are marketing/reveal beats planned throughout the run up to launch and some of them contain spoilers. Please make sure that if you do want to talk about/post anything from these that you do so in this channel to avoid spoiling the experience for everyone. This also means that for the most part I will not be answering questions around the story itself as I am sure if you are interested you would rather see the reveals or wait to play for yourself. Thank you for your understanding in all of this! i cannot wait for you to get your hands on. Not long now! (edited)
8:36 AM
https://news.xbox.com/en-us/2021/06/13/disneys-pirates-of-the-caribbean-comes-to-sea-of-thieves/
Mike Nelson, Xbox Wire Editor
Disney’s Pirates of the Caribbean Sails into Sea of Thieves in the ...
Today, Rare and Xbox are thrilled to announce an exciting collaboration with Disney, as the award-winning Sea of Thieves and Pirates of the Caribbean join forces at last. This monumental crossover will see Captain Jack Sparrow and his infamous crew arrive from beyond the horizon to spark an epic new adventure on the Sea of […]

jjgaymer☠ 20/06/2021 4:28 PM
Hey @Partners, I wanted to give you another heads up that the Sea of Thieves Showcase will be airing this evening at 7pm BST. As I said before this is full of spoilers so I would avoid this if you don't want to know significant plot points ahead of release. There is still plenty more cool pieces we aren't sharing but you should be aware of the risk here. The show lasts 40 minutes and and is a behind the scenes look at what it took to bring A Pirates Life together. If you are watching, enjoy! Also I wanted to say thank you so much to everyone that sent in their reaction videos. I know the folks at the studio loved watching and seeing all you lovely shocked faces Unfortunately not everyone made the final cut and I have been in touch with the people who did. The reaction video will air tomorrow afternoon on Rare and Xbox Channels. Thanks again, for sharing this moment with your communities. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r4S8Kn8bzCQ

jjgaymer☠ 21/06/2021 11:02 AM
Hey @Partners, As you know DMCA can be a tricky one to navigate and we have been working with music and platform partners and legal teams to craft a message everyone feels comfortable with. The below is our statement on the matter which should not be posted outside of the Discord. As it's very much a legal matter I can't comment any more than than what we have here but hope this give you an idea of what to expect. "Sea of Thieves: A Pirate’s Life contains elements of licensed music throughout the five Tall Tales which make up the original story delivered as part of the update. We are working with our music and platform partners to avoid any critical issues for creating content for Sea of Thieves: A Pirate’s Life. However, content, especially videos on demand, may be subject to monetisation claims by third-party rights owners. Please check the terms of your platform. We are currently working on a future technical update to provide a toggle that will allow creators to replace the licensed music with our original music. If you encounter any issues creating content for Sea of Thieves: A Pirate’s Life please contact us at creators@seaofthieves.com" The obvious question I am sure you will all ask is "Are we likely to get strikes or takedowns?" the response here is: "To the best of our knowledge, we don’t believe strikes or take downs are the intent. If you are subject to something you believe shouldn’t have happened, feel free to reach out to us for help clarifying."
30
jjgaymer☠ 22/06/2021 7:56 AM
Good Morning @Partners The day is finally here and I just wanted to say thank you for all the love and support you have given us over the last 10 days in the run up to A Pirates Life. It truly is a landmark moment that will no doubt change the Seas for good. Like every release I would look to you for support if any issues start to arise, you are always our first response so please, if anything does pop up try and get it into the #a-pirates-life-bugs channel and we can prioritize it. A note that we expect the servers up a little earlier around 12 (midday) BST. This isn't public knowledge as we want to try and avoid the massive wave. This is always subject to change however as the build goes through the auto release process. The usual drill as well when it comes to wait times you should expect longer than usual wait times to get into a game as with all build launches, this one being more exacerbated than normal as people beat down the door to get in. Finally, ENJOY YOURSELF! This update has had so much love poured into it and is truly epic. So please take your time to play through and soak in all that these new worlds have to offer. Bonus points if you can find the voices of me and @Madlink

jjgaymer☠ 22/06/2021 11:15 AM
Morning @Partners, I wanted to highlight the known issues of the Patch Notes for you as there are some workarounds here. Especially for those of you planning to blast through all the content today. Known Issues ‘A Pirate’s Life’ Tall Tale – Joining in Progress Joining a crew who have already made progress through checkpoints in the first Tale will spawn players in the incorrect location. For the lost player, dying and returning will bring them to the correct location in the Tale. ‘Lords of the Sea’ Tall Tale – Visual Issues Crews who have recently returned from the Tunnels of the Damned and then begin their journey through the ‘Lords of the Sea’ Tall Tale in the same gameplay session will encounter visual issues. As a workaround, this can be fixed by forcing the game to quit by using Alt+F4 on PC or closing the application on console and then rejoining your session. (edited)
4
11:15 AM
A Pirate’s Life’ Tall Tale – Joining in Progress Tunnels of the Damned – Rejoining a Session While travelling through the Tunnels of the Damned, losing your connection to the game and rejoining may cause visual issues and cause the migration to the new area to fail, returning you to your starting location. New Tall Tale Commendations – Tale Visibility Players are able to browse Commendations for ‘The Sunken Pearl’ and ‘Dark Brethren’ Tall Tales before they have completed the preceding Tale. To prevent the experience from being spoiled, avoid reading ahead! Ranged and Melee Weapon Hit Detection In areas of intense action, players may find themselves firing shots or landing strikes that do not cause damage to their targets. While improvements continue to be delivered during our content updates, this remains a key priority for the team. To learn more about known issues in Sea of Thieves currently being tracked and their status, head over to our Known Issues support site article. (edited)

AceNimrod 28/07/2021 10:09 AM
Morning @Partners! As Jordan mentioned earlier in the week I am now taking over the distribution of cosmetic prizes, so now that I have the keys I will be following a similar rhythm as previously. Cut-off time will be 9AM BST every Thursday as you're used to, but I am going to test out something a little different to see if we can improve the amount of incorrect Gamertags that your viewers send you. Hopefully this minor change will reduce the amount of stress involved with you following them up and keep the dialogue to a single message from them A common issue when viewers send in gamertags is they often send you a gamertag in the vein of: Thelegend27#4709 They believe this to be their Gamertag, but it actually isn't, and this usually leads to back and forth and unnecessary stress. So in order to correct this, from here on out for the next couple of weeks I'd like you all to try and have viewers send you a screenshot of their Xbox profile. This can be taken on any mobile device by simply screenshotting the Xbox app, and if they are on PC they can simply screenshot the Xbox App on PC. https://imgbb.com/ is an image hosting website with no account required and they can simply send you the URL of the image when uploaded. This should remove any possibility of the tag being incorrect, and you can simply type the correct tag into the Microsoft Forms system! I am looking into something more permanent for the future to make this process even smoother, but for the moment I think this is our best chance at making things run more efficiently. Cheers

jjgaymer☠ 29/07/2021 11:08 AM
Hey @Partners! As you may have seen we have soft launched Sea of Thieves Television on the Sea of Thieves Twitch Channel. After taking the Developer Stream off the air we wanted to see what we could do to make the channel more inclusive and a place that truly showcases the breadth and talent within our community. We thought why the hell not just go all in! So that's what we have done. We want Sea of Thieves Television to grow and evolve with the community much like the game has with regular programming like: Partner Showcase (A 2 hour stream with one of our amazing Partners) The Gallery (Whether it's Art, Cosplay, Props or Music this is the place to come watch our community get creative) Maiden Voyage (New to Sea of Thieves? come watch these Creators as they guide you on you adventures) Gold Rush (How much gold can you cash in within your 2 hour limit? Climb your way up those leader-boards) Premier Events (Starting with the Plunder Games we always want to make sure you have a premier event to follow along with, more exciting things in the works) and a bunch more series currently in production
11:08 AM
We want Sea of Thieves Television to become a destination for viewers to find Creators and community members they might have missed as well as a place to come to be entertained by the best in class Partners we have here in the programme. Joe @Joe Simon @StatusHidden Liam @lirolake and Heath @Edge are all here to make sure that the production of this runs smoothly they will be working directly with Rare to run the channel and I am sure will be reaching out to you all in time asking if you would like to participate. However, if you see something coming up and feel strongly about wanting to be part of a particular show or have community members you feel really fit the bill then please do reach out to one of the team and we can have a chat. Thanks to all who have participated so far and thanks in advance for all your help on future shows. As always there will be bumps in the road as we get this up and running and processes in place but I am excited for the future of what we have here and in combination with this amazing community and custom servers I'm excited for the amazing content we will see on our screens! (edited)

24
Sonicbob (Drew) 24/08/2021 3:42 PM
Hey @Partners, Tomorrow's Hotfix (https://twitter.com/SeaOfThieves/status/1430151023587467266) will address a number of issues identified in our recent August update, however with the primary goal of improving the Alt+Tab experience on Steam. We've seen the reports that from the stalls a number of exploit cases have been identified allowing players to gain an unfair advantage over other crews. While we will have resolved the Alt+Tab issue, the stall created when enabling 'Replace Gamertags' will still be present in this hotfix. Therefore in tomorrow's Hotfix we will also disable the ability to bind 'Replace Gamertags' to a Key in order to mitigate the spread of these exploits further. Note - This will not affect players who have already bound this to a key, therefore should be seen as a mitigation for these issues gaining traction and growing wider and won't take this functionality away from anyone currently using it. Given the primary users of this feature is our creators i wanted to share this in advance and give some context as to why we've made this decision to protect players from these issues. Our next steps are to investigate the stall from the Replace Gamertags tool and work to return this functionality to players, however we will more importantly focus investigating the root cause of these exploits and work to address the core issue to prevent further issues being identified.
Sea of Thieves (@SeaOfThieves)
Attention, pirates! We’ll be rolling out a necessary hotfix for Sea of Thieves tomorrow, August 25th, from around 10am BST. Following this there will be an update to download before you can next set sail, so please plan your Voyages accordingly.

StatusHidden 3/09/2021 5:22 PM
Attention, @Partners Official Sea of Thieves Supported Charity Event Opportunity Dates: September 25th, 26th, and 27th We're looking for Partners to join us during a 48 hour charity stream on the Sea of Thieves Twitch channel. Each 3 hour timeslot will feature three person crews who are tasked with securing and protecting extremely precious cargo... PINEAPPLES! We must keep this pineapple brigantine alive and filled with as many of these delectable fruit as possible, while we raise funds for a very important charity (to be announced soon). There will be viewer donation incentives during this extended voyage, so prepare yourselves for shenanigans! If you would like to get involved please message @StatusHidden or @lirolake with your preferred timeslot and crewmates. Any non-Partner crewmates are subject to approval before they are confirmed. We can also match you with other Partners if you desire. The following schedule document will be filled as we receive requests. So if a block is empty it is likely to be available. If you need assistance converting timezones or have any questions, please feel free to ask us. https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SF8oatLlyB_Kn4nD9jMxG0gHxgAQ8AdQpEVgVOF164o/edit?usp=sharing (edited)

StatusHidden 15/09/2021 6:00 PM
Good evening @Partners! Official Sea of Thieves Supported Charity Event Opportunity [RESCHEDULED] Due to circumstances out of our control we have had to reschedule this charity event, for those of you who already signed up for this event please reach out ASAP to reconfirm your time slot or let us know if you can no longer make the new date, so we can open up additional slots for more Partners! Dates: October 16th, 17th, and 18th For more detail for those only seeing this for the first time, please see below! We're looking for Partners to join us during a 48 hour charity stream on the Sea of Thieves Twitch channel. Each 3 hour timeslot will feature three person crews who are tasked with securing and protecting extremely precious cargo... PINEAPPLES! We must keep this pineapple brigantine alive and filled with as many of these delectable fruit as possible, while we raise funds for a very important charity (to be announced soon). There will be viewer donation incentives during this extended voyage, so prepare yourselves for shenanigans! If you would like to get involved please message @StatusHidden or @lirolake with your preferred timeslot and crewmates. Any non-Partner crewmates are subject to approval before they are confirmed. We can also match you with other Partners if you desire. The following schedule document will be filled as we receive requests. So if a block is empty it is likely to be available. If a block has 'TBC' the slot is filled by a crewmate pending approval. If you need assistance converting timezones or have any questions, please feel free to ask us. https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SF8oatLlyB_Kn4nD9jMxG0gHxgAQ8AdQpEVgVOF164o/edit?usp=sharing

jjgaymer☠ 6/10/2021 11:03 AM
Hey @everyone, As you may have seen on social media there has been a possible leak of Twitch information. I would advise changing the password on that account and any other sites you use that password on and also enabling two factor authentication. As an aside once you have done this, please go to seaofthieves.com/twitch-drops and un-link and re-link your account as there can sometimes be a bug that causes your account to de-sync when your Twitch password is changed. This will ensure you are all good to go for the next set of drops.

AceNimrod 8/10/2021 9:11 AM
Hey @Partners! Some of you may have already spotted, but Twitch have now added a handy phone verification feature to chat restrictions in an attempt to combat hate raids and bot spamming. This will allow you to place levels of restriction on people's ability to chat in your stream depending on whether they have a verified phone number attached to their account or not. For more information on the details of this change and how you can activate it on your own channels, see the link here: https://blog.twitch.tv/en/2021/09/29/securing-your-chat-with-phone-and-email-verification/
Twitch Blog | Securing your Chat with Phone and Email Verification
Hate and harassment of any kind is unacceptable and prohibited on Twitch, whether it’s an offensive message, malicious follows, or the egregious “hate raid” attacks that have targeted marginalized ...

AceNimrod 15/11/2021 11:26 AM
Morning @Partners! Apologies that things were a little shaky last week I was unfortunately unwell and not in office! All Partner prizes from last week should now be applied minus the few that I have sent DMs to! also an important PSA, as in the last month we've had a fair few Partners chase up codes not being applied, but if the winner of the prize does not log into the game with their pirate the item will not show up in their inventories, So using the SoT website's inventory page will not show the item in their inventory if they have not logged in since the item was applied! Please ensure that you have your winners confirm that they can't see the cosmetic in their item chests in-game before submitting a request for us to check the cosmetic application status Thanks and things will be back to normal with Prizes this week! Cheers (edited)

7
4
AceNimrod 22/11/2021 11:32 AM
Morning @Partners! I've recently been doing some investigating as a number of you have mentioned that the directory seemed to not quite be working for you, such as the directory displaying you as offline when you are streaming! After some investigation with the web team, it seems that the root cause of this is when you change your Twitch name. The way our directory works is it generates a twitch URL based on your name when you were added to the Directory, so for example: Name given in directory form: example1 Twitch URL generated: https://twitch.tv/example1 The way our directory checks if you are online is through checking this url, so if you change your username, your twitch URL also changes, but not on our end unless we know you've changed usernames! So in future if anyone changes their Twitch Stream name, please let us know so that we can get that updated in the Directory, and your directory profile should start working as intended again once that's matched up Cheers!

8
AceNimrod 16/12/2021 5:08 PM
Ahoy @Partners! As we creep ever closer to Xmas, my time as an Intern at Rare coming to an end, with tomorrow being my last day in-office! I can honestly say it's been an absolute pleasure working with each and every one of you, and being able to go on this journey with you all through the launch of some of our biggest and most awe inspiring updates of the year like A Pirate's Life has been a joy from start to finish. I hope you've all enjoyed working with me as much as I have with you, because the good news is I'm going to be sticking around a little longer.. Starting next month I will be moving to devote all of my time into making this Programme the best it can be and continuing my duties running the Affiliate Alliance as a Creator Engagement Producer! This means that there will hopefully be a lot of fun things to come in the new year for the Programme as I will have more time to devote to your lovely faces as a more leading part of the Partner Programme. Until then though, I hope you all have a wonderful Christmas and New year, and I will see you all in January when I get back Josh/Ace (edited)

jjgaymer☠ 24/12/2021 2:44 PM
Hey @Partners I wanted to write a quick post just to finish up the year here. First of all I just wanted to say a massive thank you to everyone here, both Creators and Devs. It’s been such a journey these past three and a bit years watching the game grow and you folks alongside it. It’s been a rollercoaster ride of ups and downs and we have learned so much from each other along the way. 2022 is super exciting because I believe it’s going to take all the learnings from the past 8 years of development and really hone in on what it means to run this game as an ever evolving service. We have a tonne to share with you in January and want to give you all a look at what the future is for Sea of Thieves. We are also committing to doubling down on Creators, so that means more Partner Programme, more Twitch and more Sea of Thieves Television next year! It’s an exciting time to be part of the community and I want to thank you all for your continued support, it really does help us shape the roadmap and ultimately the game that millions of people play every month. Thank you and have an amazing holiday period and I will catch you all in 2022!!

j0toro 7/01/2022 12:53 PM
Afternoon @Partners We are about to kickstart out planning for this year's GameBlast - a 24 hour stream across the last weekend of February (25th - 27th) to raise money for the incredible UK-based Charity Special Effect. Special Effect are on a mission to make gaming accessible to everyone and do incredible work around the world, building custom controllers and other integrations to allow anyone and everyone to play their favourite games. We are looking to do a 24 hour stream from the SoT Twitch, utilising the Tavern (hopefully!) and creating 24 hours of amazing content from us, Partners, Affiliate Alliances, Deckhands and more! The idea behind this is that no one is committed to doing 24 hours and instead we can cut across to brilliant content from around the world as we showcase the varied world of SoT and all you can do. We'll be throwing in some challenges, forfeits and donation goals as well, alongside some giveaways. We would love to have your involvement in it so please, drop a react if you'd like to be involved. Special Effect: https://www.specialeffect.org.uk/ Gameblast: https://www.specialeffect.org.uk/news/gameblast-is-back-for-2022 (edited)

Hey @Partners! It's time to kick off the plans we have for this year! To get folks up to speed I would love to get as many of you as possible on a call. On Thursday 27th we have some important news to share with the community about the exciting plans for this year. However, we would like to invite you to have a look at the video we will be sharing beforehand and give you an opportunity to chat to the developers afterwards who will be there to answer any questions you may have. The call will kick off at 3:30pm GMT this Thursday 27th January. It will last 90 mins and should give you enough time to get back online to watch the video live with your community as it airs at 6pm GMT. As we will be sharing video with you during the call we are still working out the best platform for this, I will get the details over to you all as soon as we have made a decision on it. In the meantime, I hope to see as many of you there as possible and look forward to sharing more with you soon!

AceNimrod 1/02/2022 1:52 PM
Afternoon @Partners! I wanted to take some time to address the current plans for an April Fool’s Day wheelbarrow prank that is currently in motion. We as much as anyone understand the fun of jokes and lighthearted moments within the community. However, it's important to understand your position as Partners here, and the potential impact of actions like this. As Partners, you are all privy to information that is considered confidential, and as such there is a level of trust and credibility attached to the things you say, when you say them. When these kinds of jokes are spread over a long period of time they can undermine that trust, losing their intended effect as a joke and instead having unintended consequences that negatively impact the community. We purposefully do not do April Fool’s Day for Sea of Thieves or as Rare, because we’re all too aware of the potential repercussions. A prank on this scale could create a level of expectation and excitement around the proposed ‘feature’ that will only lead to eventual disappointment within the community. And this may, in turn, create unnecessary pressure on the studio team to create a feature that was never intended or planned for, which will only lead to wider disappointment when this feature is not delivered. While we understand there are no bad intentions here, we think it would be best to retire this idea before it picks up too much momentum, as the potential damage it could do if it gains traction is quite significant. Apologies that this likely isn't the thing you all want to hear, but we hope you understand that we would like to prevent any unnecessary disappointments or difficult conversations arising where they could easily be avoided.
29
2
AceNimrod 2/02/2022 11:26 AM
@Partners IMPORTANT TWITCH DROPS ANNOUNCEMENT Due to an unforeseen issue with one of the items in our next Twitch Drops selection, we have made the difficult decision to push back the drops period to the following dates: Season 5 - Drop 3 February 18th 18th Feb - Friday - Twilight Hunter Pegleg 19th Feb - Saturday - Twilight Hunter Boots 20th Feb - Sunday - Twilight Hunter Shirt 21st Feb - Monday - Twilight Hunter Trousers Apologies that this comes so shortly after announcing that we wouldn't shift Drops dates, but in order to try and ensure that this Drops period runs as smoothly as possible for you all this is our best option. We can only apologise to those of you that have booked some time off and made plans to maximise your stream time through the original dates. While we appreciate the move is inconvenient, a few of you have also raised whether or not it would be better to shuffle Drops periods back to coincide with Adventures landing - so, candidly, while this shuffle is being made due to a concern with one of the items that will need a little more time to investigate - it may also be a good litmus test for future Drops periods. We'd love your feedback the other side of this set of Drops regarding timings, as our new Seasonal set up is still new to us, and we want to ensure we're offering you Drops opportunities where you feel you can make the biggest impact. In light of us moving this Drops period, we have also decided to increase your Obsidian Capstan Limit to 2 and your Obsidian Six pack limit to 25 for the month of February, which should hopefully allow you to do some extra giveaways in your own time around the new Adventure launch period. Thanks for your understanding.

j0toro 10/03/2022 12:30 PM
@Partners We are now back online and welcoming in Season 6. Read all about it in the Release Notes and celebrate with your communities. On another note, many of you will be pleased to know that as a thank you for your ongoing commitment to the game, community and Pirate Code, we will be gifting you all The Good Boy ship set regardless of Sea Dog level before we made the announcement around the closure of The Arena. We ask that you please accept this gift without inappropriate posting and flexing as many others will have missed out and are angry and emotional at this time. Sail with pride and humility under the sails of Kato, best boy on the seas (edited)

j0toro 10/03/2022 7:30 PM
@Partners We are aware that a few of you are encountering stream snipers. You should all be streaming with scrambled gamertags, for yours and the players you meet protection (no one wants their GT broadcast to thousands without their knowledge or consent). If you meet suspected stream snipers or cheaters who are utilising third party apps to hunt you down GO TO YOUR BRB SCREEN AND PULL TAGS! Use those tags to report the players with evidence to our support team. DO NOT report them here and DO NOT make their GTs public. Each incident deserves fair investigation and we are working our hardest to protect you from these things but safeguarding goes both ways. https://support.seaofthieves.com/hc/en-gb/requests/new (edited)

AceNimrod 11/03/2022 2:43 PM
@Partners Just a quick heads up looks like a bunch of the Cosmetics I applied yesterday bounced, will reapply them this evening so if you have anyone asking about cosmetics not appearing for them yet, let them know it will be done over the weekend and they should check again Monday morning!
18
j0toro 14/03/2022 3:36 PM
@Partners Hi all, we have taken on board the sentiment from both here and the community since we gifted The Good Boy ship set to all Partners - thanks for taking the time to provide us with your own and your communities' feedback on this. In line with what we've heard from you and our wider playerbase, we want to advise that going forward cosmetics will only be gifted to your accounts as part of the advanced Twitch Drops programme, alongside the Ancient Coins we add to your account on a monthly basis. As part of this, starting with Season Six, you might've noticed that we have changed this process slightly so you get an automatic entitlement to the Seasonal Plunder Pass rather than you having to purchase it through the front end yourselves. This means that items not already earned in game or via promotions will not be added to any Partner's account, and bonuses or cosmetic requests outside of those listed above will not be considered. I will also be dropping this into #rare-answers so that it can be easily found for future reference.
