AceNimrod 17/03/2022 4:33 PM
@Partners Just as a heads up to inform you all on Twitch Drops as you'll likely get questions regarding upcoming drops: To address confusion regarding Twilight Hunter Twitch Drops: the blue and yellow gear first shown, along with the weapons and equipment already distributed, are the correct Twilight Hunter cosmetics. Additional items in this set will be distributed via Twitch Drops in the future. Gear currently bearing the Twilight Hunter name that features a brown and red colour palette will be renamed in an April update to Nightfall Hunter. Following this, the complete Nightfall Hunter set will be available in Outpost stores. We're sorry for any confusion caused. You can find a tweet detailing this on @sot_support on twitter if you need to direct confused players to this!

AceNimrod pinned a message to this channel. 27/04/2022 2:53 PM
lirolake 27/04/2022 9:59 PM
Ahoy @everyone Sea of Thieves Television has some more Last Ship Standing slots available. The event takes place each Friday of the month at 4:00 PM for 3 hours. Crews will go up against each other in this high-intensity battle to find out who is the Last Ship Standing! Starting at an outpost, crews will be forced to slowly merge onto each other until one crew is left afloat. The overall winner of the first 3 days will be able to give out an Obsidian Six Pack each The winner of the final day will be able to give out an Obsidian Capstan each We currently have 4 available crew slots for May. The dates of the shows will be: Friday, 6 May 2022 4:00:00 PM-7:00 PM Friday, 13 May 2022 4:00:00 PM-7:00 PM Friday, 20 May 2022 4:00:00 PM-7:00 PM Friday, 27 May 2022 4:00:00 PM-7:00 PM You will need to be available all 4 days to take part. If you would like more details about the show, or have any issues with signing up. Please reach out to a member of the Sea of Thieves Television These show opportunities are available to everyone who has not taken part in a Sea of Thieves Television Last Ship Standing event. All other show opportunities are available to everyone. Please review the currently available shows below and place your name in a blank Main Guest/Captain slot, then submit your desired crew member(s). When submitting a crew member(s) they must be approved by production before final acceptance. Check out the link below to sign up. https://sot-tv.statuseffect.co/account The link will have you log into your Discord and Twitch accounts. If you do not see the show details, please DM me so I can sort out your account. Thanks! (edited)

j0toro 16/05/2022 9:26 AM
@Affiliate @Partners @Variety Due to feedback we have received, the Eastern Winds Jade Beard has been removed from the Outpost Store. Players who bought the beard will no longer be able to view it in their Vanity Chests or equip it and will receive a refund in the next week. Anyone here with questions can direct them to myself. We were going to deal with this ad-hoc and direct people to Support as the negative feedback was very localised from our Asian territories, but apparently there has been chatter from people without the full story which is leading to misinformation. If you have players asking please just use the part of this message that is in bold to give answers.

AceNimrod 6/06/2022 9:35 AM
Morning @Partners! We are looking to test out some new drops systems based on Programme feedback, and we wanted to see which of the two current ideas you would like to try. These ideas have been formed to try and reduce the need for long 6 day drops periods that fatigue you and our players, as well as rotate through sets a bit more quickly so that we aren't giving out the same cosmetic set for a year! The ideas are as follows: IDEA 1: DOUBLE DROPS INCREASED TIME This idea basically means that on each individual day of say a 4 day period (the usual Friday to Monday period we are used to) there will be not 1 but 2 items available for drops per day. This means that in total, viewers will gain 8 drops items instead of 4 in total without having to watch 8 days worth of drops. This would be accompanied with an increase in the required viewing time for Drops, from 20 minutes to around 1-2hrs, but players will still be required to watch every day to earn each day's individual drops. IDEA 2: CUMULATIVE DROPS This idea would basically see players watching for a larger cumulative total across a drops period (say 4 or 5 hours for example) but upon achieving the watch time you unlock every drops item in that particular drop period. So for example if a viewer watches 5 hours of a streamer on friday, each hour they will unlock a new drop item from the available pool in the Friday-Monday period. This means the viewer can spread their watch time however they like across the weekend, but each hour is rewarded. If you could all vote either the Orange heart for IDEA 1 or the Purple heart for IDEA 2 we will take a look at the results at the end of this week and see how we would like to proceed, if you have any comments on these new systems, please feel free to drop them in the temporary channel we've spun up called #drops-feedback. (edited)

AceNimrod 13/06/2022 3:35 PM
Good Afternoon @Partners! As you've no doubt seen, we unveiled our latest update live at the Xbox and Bethesda Showcase yesterday, and we are very excited for you all to get sunk in to all the fun things we have in store. In anticipation of this event we have arranged for our next Partner call to be Friday, 17 June 2022 2:00:00 PM where the team would like to chat with you about the update and what we have coming up in the near future for Sea of Thieves. We will be joined by some of the key team members that brought Captaincy to life and we would love for you all to attend, so mark your calendars! Looking forward to seeing what you all think!

AceNimrod 16/06/2022 12:14 PM
Good Afternoon @Partners, I come with some news as well as a reminder about Cosmetic Prizes! Firstly the news, I'm afraid that I will be leaving the Rare Family for a new adventure this month. I can honestly say that it has been an honour and a privilege to work with so many passionate and dedicated content creators, and the love you all have for our Pirate game and this Programme has definitely rubbed off on me! My last day working as your Creator Engagement Producer and operating the Partner Programme will be Wednesday 22nd June, so if you have any things that need chasing up on or sorting before I go now is your chance! If any of you would like to keep in touch you're welcome to drop me a friend request on Discord And Secondly for your Cosmetic Prize reminder! I will be closing the Cosmetic Prize submission window at 12:30 PM so you have until then to get this week's cosmetic prizes submitted! Anything after that will be processed in next week's batch after I've disappeared! All the best, Ace

Please note these dates are still subject to change depending on our content calendar, but for the moment they are accurate and not set to change. Season 7 Drop 1 will be a short test weekend for one of the alternate systems of Drops awarding through Twitch, we have decided to give the cumulative drops a try for a single weekend outside of our normal drops calendar, so that it doesn't affect your usual offering. You will just get an extra drops window in July to take advantage of after we launch our Captaincy update! (edited)

AceNimrod 22/06/2022 3:12 PM
Well @Partners @Affiliate It's the end of the road for me and my adventure at Rare, so it's off to a new Adventure for me! Love Ace

j0toro 14/07/2022 12:45 PM
@everyone PLEASE READ As part of streamlining how we can help you and answer questions, and to allow us some downtime when we're off and away from DMs, we have introduced ModMail to the server. Any submissions via ModMail will ping both the Admiral and First Mate and someone will get back to you during their working hours. While we understand things need answering, and there are many timezones to cater to, this is to avoid an 'always on' feeling for those of us who are here for you - it will also mean that you get an answer as soon as someone is around whereas this isn't guaranteed if it is outside of working hours or if someone is on holiday etc. ModMail will also track who has answered what and what has been said, allowing us to have eyes on more of the conversations taking place here so we can best look after you all. Shorky and ZiNc have set up the new ModMail categories with instructions on how to use it and also were you can drop your queries. Just to be clear - YOUR QUERIES CAN NOT BE SEEN BY OTHERS! Once you open a ticket it will move to DMs so everything you ask or say is still private as we understand that is often why you reach out via DMs and not in the ask-rare channels etc. We still very much want to protect this privacy and allow for open and honest conversation away from the main channels, but also allow the team to share the load a bit. #modmail-info has the info you need but you can submit a question in any channel using the commands and it will remain private to you. (edited)

j0toro 18/07/2022 1:13 PM
@Affiliate @Partners @Variety Hi all, We wanted to give you a brief update and just to preempt it, this is not something we want shared but something we wish to allow you space to discuss. A few weeks ago the team at Rare were notified of the passing of Rob, RareCSM. We have held this fairly closely until now and the studio is still very much grieving. However, with a touching tribute now online in GI Biz, we feel it is right to make you aware and to ask that you respect Rob's privacy and do not take this outside of this space, however we know his absence has been noticed by a few and many of you worked closely with him. Rob was an incredibly private man and we will continue to honour this as we move forward. We ask that you do not discuss this with your communities etc and please respect our wishes in this. We also ask that you do not acknowledge anywhere that Rob was RareCSM. This is to prevent his legacy from abuse or impersonation from bad actors within our community. Rob was a good man, he did a lot for us. We owe him that much. Many thanks, The Rare Team https://www.gamesindustry.biz/articles/2022-07-18-rare-pays-tribute-to-robert-ashby

lirolake 7/09/2022 3:00 PM
Ahoy, @Partners, @Affiliate, and Creator Crew! Following the incredible success of last year's Pineapple Plunder charity marathon, we're taking things to the next level and introducing a new culinary competition. We're calling all members of the Creator Crew to step up and represent either Team Hunter, Team Gather, or Team Grub, in a delicious battle over a 24 hour period. Those of you who participate and help raise funds for the charity No Kid Hungry, will receive the Gilded Phoenix Weapon Set both on your account and with the ability to giveaway a set to your community and viewers! This broadcast will begin on Friday, 30 September 2022 1:00:00 PM and will last until Saturday, 1 October 2022 1:00:00 PM. Each crew will play in a 3 hour time slot before passing their ship to the next crew. The goal of the broadcast will have Team Hunter versus Team Gather, as they both collect recipe ingredients. Each recipe turned in will secure points on the scoreboard. While this is happening, the viewers will donate to control Team Grub's vessel to cause chaos for our two hero teams. Please register your Captain and crew as soon as possible, along with gamertags and Twitch usernames by navigating to the Sea of Thieves TV Portal and selecting the No Kid Hungry signup document: https://sot-tv.statuseffect.co Please consult the world time clock to ensure you signup for the correct time slot in your region: https://sot-tv.statuseffect.co/timezone Note: Image and Information currently under NDA (edited)

H1gh Voltage 27/10/2022 2:32 PM
Hey @Partners and @Affiliate, We are trying to gauge your interest in participating in a special campaign we are planning around winter holidays (Dec 19th to Jan 2nd) - the Festival of Giving. It's going to be totally up to you to take part or not: The overall idea is to give select Creators, AAs and Partners the ability to gift cosmetics to players they meet on the sea. Participants will have their own captaincy banner that they can apply along with a unique set of sails for the duration of the campaign. When another player approaches them, both parties will have to perform some kind of friendly interaction (like playing a shanty or exchanging an item) and the gift of unique sails, flag and some gold will be gifted to the players account. Also, attached is just one of the concepts we have for the sails, it's not final yet, but shall give you the general direction we are heading towards. If this is something you'd like to take part in, please smash the emoji under that post and, of course, would love to hear your feedback!

H1gh Voltage 7/12/2022 9:41 PM
@Partners, @Affiliate Hey all, some of this information about upcoming Festival of Giving was posted in general chats earlier, but I want to make sure it is clear and visible to everybody: Creator Festival of Giving: When it comes to a gifting mechanic announced earlier - https://discord.com/channels/550315686636027908/625611888956276736/1035199325283815484, sadly we ran into some technical issues that made it impossible to get everything ready in time for winter holidays. However, we are still committed to bringing it to the game. It looks like we'll just have to wait until some time next year when it's working properly. The Festival of Giving is still happening as scheduled with Gifts and Glory, Grogmanay and Emporium sale planned. Festival of Giving Drops for All: This Christmas we are turning on Drops for everybody streaming Sea of Thieves from Dec 19th to Jan 2nd and giving away complete clothing/vanity Frozen Horizon set. The set is going to be broken into smaller bundles running in this order: 10am 19 Dec - 9am 22 Dec – Belt, Boots, Dress 10am 22 Dec - 9am 26 Dec – Hook, Hat, Trousers 10am 26 Dec - 9am 29 Dec – Frigid Hair, Gloves, Beard 10am 29 Dec - 10am 02 Jan – Tundra Hair, Eyepatch, Pegleg, Jacket The rules for acquiring cosmetics are same as always - 1 hour per item consecutively. Promo images and assets for the drops can be found here: (edited)

lirolake 13/02/2023 5:37 PM
Ahoy @everyone Following on from the success of GameBlast 2022, we're going to be taking part again this year! Those who participate and help raise funds for Special Effect will receive the Gilded Phoenix Weapon Set, along with a bonus set to use as a giveaway in their community. The broadcast will take place from Saturday, 25 February 2023 12:00:00 PM until Sunday, 26 February 2023 12:00:00 PM, with crews joining forces to gain as many points as possible for their team to win. The event will be a Attacker/Defender style game mode, all focused around Gunpowder Barrels. Teams will take it in turns to collect as many kegs and deliver them safely to a designated safe zone. Once both teams have had a turn attacking and defending, we'll come together for an explosive score reveal before switching out the crews. Viewers will be able to donate to force crews to complete certain tasks, such as dropping the anchor, drinking grog, or even forcing kegs to explode! If you would like to take part in the event, please register your interest at https://sot-tv.statuseffect.co/account Registration will stay open until Friday, 17 February 2023 12:00:00 PM. Participation is not on a first come, first served basis, so don't worry about missing out if you're reading this announcement a few hours after it was posted! We encourage everyone to also take part in our donation drive by joining the Tiltify team. You can join the team by clicking the "Support this Campaign" button on this page: https://tiltify.com/+sea-of-thieves-television/gameblast23 If there are any questions, please do reach out to the @deleted-role team. Happy Sailing
5
3
3
2
2
lirolake 16/02/2023 12:30 PM
@everyone Less than 24 hours until the registration closes. If you have entered somebody in the "want to sail with somebody specific?" section, please make sure that they have also gone into the system and selected their available times. As a reminder, we do also have the campaign that you can support and join us in GameBlast, even if you don't take part in the official event. Just click the link to join the team: https://tiltify.com/+sea-of-thieves-television/gameblast23/start Again, if you have any questions, do please reach out to one of the @deleted-role team

Sea of Thieves (@SeaOfThieves)
One week today we’re offering up four more pieces of the Eastern Winds Sapphire clothing collection via Twitch Drops! To claim yours, watch any Partnered Sea of Thieves streamer for one hour per item between Feb 24th and 27th (10am UTC). Link accounts: https://t.co/u0ta5Zu0th

So, the new dates and cosmetics are: 26th-29th May - Eastern Winds Ruby Equipment part 1: compass, fishing rod, pocket watch, spyglass. I don't want you getting caught out, especially if you are live and people come into your chat so please be aware that the following changes are being made to Captaincy: https://www.seaofthieves.com/news/captaincy-rebalance Also just to repeat myself - This article is live now but we will not be posting about it until 3:00 PM! H1gh Voltage 11/05/2023 8:42 AM

7
j0toro 16/05/2023 3:00 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends Just an update from us in terms of how we're currently protecting you on the seas. As you may know, we removed safe groupings when Season 8 launched. Unfortunately we have seen and dealt with multiple examples of targeted harassment towards some Partners since then so recently reinstated safe groupings. These groupings ONLY apply when you are in Adventure mode and are over-written by cross-stamp matchmaking if you dive meaning we can not protect you from bad actors if you are diving. The grouping will protect your organic Adventure experience (as best as we can) while not reducing your player pools if diving for PvP. PLEASE NOTE: Only Partner GTs are protected. If you join a ship not spun up by a Partner it will fall outside of these groupings.

@Partners, @Partner Legends and @Affiliate Information for transparency and because surely you are going to get questions from your communities about this: Twitch Taiwan are running community tournament during this and next weekend, so prepare for the category to get a lot of creators like this playing SoT out of nowhere, many of them are jumping in the game for the first time The tournament has just started with skirmishes and qualifiers this week and should have finals next weekend, we offered RMS clothing drops for 60+ participants of the event and some Steam keys they can giveaway. H1gh Voltage 19/07/2023 10:19 AM
@Partners, @Partner Legends, @Affiliate Hi all, Ahead of the first Tall Tale of our Sea of Thieves: Legend to Monkey Island experience arriving tomorrow, we wanted to ensure you all knew where you stood in terms of licensed music content. As part of the launch of this Tale, we will be changing the front end menu music to a copyrighted tune - and as such, will potentially be something that could cause for strike action to be taken against creators. To keep yourselves as safe as possible, we suggest turning the 'Mute Copyright Audio' setting on, in the Game Settings menu, before the launch of the build tomorrow. This will be the best way to protect your channels against any action from that very first stream. Iconic music from the Monkey Island series will also be playing throughout the course this set of Tall Tales, so we recommend you keep this setting on when engaging with this content too. P.S. We have tested a let's play of the first Tall Tale on YouTube few days ago and it didn't raise any flags on upload, BUT that's not a 100% guarantee, especially in regards to that tune in the starting menu, so please be cautious around it tomorrow. Hopefully, you won't have any trouble at all!
19
6
4
3
j0toro 20/07/2023 10:01 AM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate *A slight update to yesterday's DMCA post. Please circulate as needed: * Please be aware that your Audio Copyright settings will not take effect until you have loaded into the game. To avoid DMCA strikes or licensing issues, please mute music until you can load into the game and these settings will then be saved for that session. We advise streaming the title screen with no audio.

The Sea of Thieves team are aware that some pirates playing in languages other than English are reporting issues with the consistency of localised text. They are investigating the issue now, and hope to update you soon on a resolution.
11
H1gh Voltage 26/07/2023 11:05 AM
@Partners, @Partner Legends and @Affiliate There are a few changes in the #roadmap with Monkey Island Tall Tales 2 and 3 and Legend's week shifting dates a bit. Please take a look for more details!
4
4
H1gh Voltage 26/07/2023 11:29 AM
Also @Partners, @Partner Legends, @Affiliate SEASON 10 WILL BE LAUNCHING IN OCTOBER The content that is coming in Season 10 is proving challenging to integrate into the game and, as such, we need more development time. It's a headline feature and it's impact on how we play SoT will be huge. As such, it's important we get it right. Moving Season Ten is not what we wanted but it has given us the opportunity to bolster it with even more content. There are many new features coming alongside the headline feature and this will make it a HUGE Season for SoT with features, changes and QoL updates throughout its period. WHAT WE ARE DOING ABOUT IT As well as two more Monkey Island Tall Tales, the team have worked hard to create some live events for our players, to keep them engaged in SoT over the coming months. These include:
  • Talk Like A Pirate Day Community Weekend with a bonus Style of Thieves
  • Summer of SoT
  • Gold & Glory
  • Legends Week
Our Community Weekend will replace where Season Ten's Community Weekend was going to be and will debut a brand new feature that has been developed specifically for this event. AND FINALLY We are sorry. We know a consistent rhythm is something many of our players have come to expect (most of the time) and this extension will mean that Season 9 is our longest to date. It doesn't make life easier when you have to create content around the game no matter what is happening with it. Hopefully, the Tall Tales and live events will help you a bit on the long stretch to S10. (edited)

5
j0toro 10/08/2023 9:19 AM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate As of yesterday we began rolling out a silent fix to mitigate teleportation across all servers. This has so far seen a dramatic dip in reports over the last 24 hours and we hope it continues this way as it is applied to all servers. We understand this particular cheat has been difficult for you and our players to deal with so we hope it goes some way into allowing you a more balanced session. Cheat development is an ongoing challenge and our teams are working incredibly hard to ensure Sea of Thieves is a safe place to play and create. We hope to share more with you in the future but, for now, the conversations that are being had are very promising but under the highest NDA so can not be shared. Please continue to report any instances of cheating you see to help us not only take action against the players using them, but also to help prioritise what we target next.

DO NOT DISCLOSE THE FOLLOWING

In around an hour there will be a server shut down while we roll out a fix for the server crashes. ALL PLAYERS WILL BE BOOTED FROM THE GAME! There is no down time, players will be able to reconnect instantly and will be forced to the new servers that have this fix. Player messaging will be going out on socials, front-end load-in menu and sticky note in game at around 1pm UK time, maybe a bit after cos I need to finish lunch.

H1gh Voltage 12/09/2023 9:49 AM
@Partners, @Partner Legends, @Affiliate We've planned something very different for our next Community Weekend on September 30th – October 2nd and wanted to give you heads up ahead of public announcement! Please do not share anything below anywhere yet: Living the stream Item one on the agenda is how to increase the Community Emissary Grade, which takes on a brand new form for this Season’s Community Weekend fun. Whereas previously players could contribute to boosting the Grade level by using the #SeaOfThievesCommunityDay tag on Twitter, this time the level of multiplier – and more – will be powered by how much time players spend watching the Sea of Thieves category on Twitch! That’s right: all you need to do to help raise the Community Emissary Grade is tune into any of your favourite content creators in the Sea of Thieves category between 10am UTC on Saturday, 30th September and 10am UTC on Monday, 2nd October. As with previous Community events, as the Community Emissary Grade raises, so will the amount of gold, reputation, Renown and Allegiance available – with the top Grade offering two-and-a-half times the reward for your work! For those of you who are still yet to hit level 100 Renown for Season Nine, this will be your chance to race through those numbers and make a pretty penny at the same time. And if you’re a few levels off scoring your first Hourglass-related curse, the same applies to you too – this weekend serves as the perfect opportunity for you to maximise your progress and earn some serious stonks. Raising the Bar Talking of streams, the Rare crew will be setting sail on the Saturday morning, live from the on-site tavern! Tankards will be raised, chaos will ensue, pirates will plunder and a gay old time will be had. Join the gang from 10am UTC on Saturday, 30th September to kick off the event with a healthy dose of shenanigans. Every minute you spend watching it will also work towards raising that Community Emissary Grade, and may even earn you some Twitch Drops at the same time. That’s very efficient viewing, by our standards. Top of the Drops Tuning into your favourite Sea of Thieves content creators (and of course us, on the Saturday morning) will also work towards unlocking a sweet suite of Drops over the course of the weekend! As the Community Emissary Grade rises through the ranks, so does the amount of Drops available over the event. Things will kick off without any Drops on, so players will need to kickstart the programme of earnables by hitting the second Community Emissary Grade. Then, from Grade Two through to Grade Five, the Eastern Winds Ruby Sturdy Boots, Gilded Phoenix Cutlass, Eastern Winds Ruby Bejewelled Gloves and Gilded Phoenix Eye of Reach will all unlock Grade by Grade, and by the end of the event will – hopefully – all be available to swipe by watching your favourite streamer in the Sea of Thieves category for an hour per item. We’ve also set you a sneaky extra goal, which will bag you a bonus Drop should you rise to the challenge: if you all manage to get Sea of Thieves into the Top 10 categories (by highest viewers) on Twitch at any point in the weekend, you’ll unlock a very special Twitch Drop: the Obsidian Ship’s Crest. This is the first ever time we’ll have introduced the Obsidian Ship’s Crest to the Sea of Thieves, which will be exclusive to Sea of Thieves Community Weekends for the foreseeable future. This makes the Obsidian Ship’s Crest a super swish, super rare item to have in your inventory, which can only be equipped to Captained ships – so we suggest doing everything you can to get this outrageously cool item available for everyone over the weekend. Just make sure that your Sea of Thieves and Twitch accounts are linked ahead of time to ensure you benefit from all these brilliant bonus items on offer!
16
1
1
H1gh Voltage
@Partners, @Partner Legends, @Affiliate We've planned something very different for our next Community Weekend on September 30th – October 2nd and wanted to give you heads up ahead of public announcement! Please do not share anything below anywhere yet: Living the stream Item one on the agenda is how to increase the Community Emissary Grade, which takes on a brand new form for this Season’s Community Weekend fun. Whereas previously players could contribute to boosting the Grade level by using the #SeaOfThievesCommunityDay tag on Twitter, this time the level of multiplier – and more – will be powered by how much time players spend watching the Sea of Thieves category on Twitch! That’s right: all you need to do to help raise the Community Emissary Grade is tune into any of your favourite content creators in the Sea of Thieves category between 10am UTC on Saturday, 30th September and 10am UTC on Monday, 2nd October. As with previous Community events, as the Community Emissary Grade raises, so will the amount of gold, reputation, Renown and Allegiance available – with the top Grade offering two-and-a-half times the reward for your work! For those of you who are still yet to hit level 100 Renown for Season Nine, this will be your chance to race through those numbers and make a pretty penny at the same time. And if you’re a few levels off scoring your first Hourglass-related curse, the same applies to you too – this weekend serves as the perfect opportunity for you to maximise your progress and earn some serious stonks. Raising the Bar Talking of streams, the Rare crew will be setting sail on the Saturday morning, live from the on-site tavern! Tankards will be raised, chaos will ensue, pirates will plunder and a gay old time will be had. Join the gang from 10am UTC on Saturday, 30th September to kick off the event with a healthy dose of shenanigans. Every minute you spend watching it will also work towards raising that Community Emissary Grade, and may even earn you some Twitch Drops at the same time. That’s very efficient viewing, by our standards. Top of the Drops Tuning into your favourite Sea of Thieves content creators (and of course us, on the Saturday morning) will also work towards unlocking a sweet suite of Drops over the course of the weekend! As the Community Emissary Grade rises through the ranks, so does the amount of Drops available over the event. Things will kick off without any Drops on, so players will need to kickstart the programme of earnables by hitting the second Community Emissary Grade. Then, from Grade Two through to Grade Five, the Eastern Winds Ruby Sturdy Boots, Gilded Phoenix Cutlass, Eastern Winds Ruby Bejewelled Gloves and Gilded Phoenix Eye of Reach will all unlock Grade by Grade, and by the end of the event will – hopefully – all be available to swipe by watching your favourite streamer in the Sea of Thieves category for an hour per item. We’ve also set you a sneaky extra goal, which will bag you a bonus Drop should you rise to the challenge: if you all manage to get Sea of Thieves into the Top 10 categories (by highest viewers) on Twitch at any point in the weekend, you’ll unlock a very special Twitch Drop: the Obsidian Ship’s Crest. This is the first ever time we’ll have introduced the Obsidian Ship’s Crest to the Sea of Thieves, which will be exclusive to Sea of Thieves Community Weekends for the foreseeable future. This makes the Obsidian Ship’s Crest a super swish, super rare item to have in your inventory, which can only be equipped to Captained ships – so we suggest doing everything you can to get this outrageously cool item available for everyone over the weekend. Just make sure that your Sea of Thieves and Twitch accounts are linked ahead of time to ensure you benefit from all these brilliant bonus items on offer!
H1gh Voltage 12/09/2023 9:51 AM
Presenting: Pop-Up Plunder It’s not just the increased rewards and more Twitch Drops you stand to benefit from as you race through the different Community Emissary Grades. Every time the community collectively levels up, we’ll introduce a new piece of Pop-Up Plunder to every single server of Sea of Thieves. But what is Pop-Up Plunder, we hear you cry? Well, we can answer that for you right now: it’s a way for us to sneak terrific treasures into the world on the fly. And if you think that sounds cool, it’s because it is. Every time Pop-Up Plunder becomes available, players will receive a notification in-game that fresh loot is live and that a clue regarding the whereabouts of the high-value haul has been released somewhere to Sea of Thieves’ official social media channels. There will only be one plunderous prize per server, and each will only be discoverable for an hour before it disappears – so you’ll have to be swift on social and on sea to secure your stash. However it’s not all the dreamy pirate’s life, as there’s a certain amount of strife involved in the retrieval of these special stashes of loot. Once the Pop-Up Plunder in question has been dug up, a cheeky little map marker will appear for everyone else sailing on the same sea – just so they know the precious prize hasn’t been handed in yet and they can still steal it. If you’re thinking, ‘well, that sounds dastardly’ – you’re right. We designed it like that, because we are dastardly. You’re welcome. Of course, if we’re suggesting that you might need to scrap to hold onto these spoils, it’s because we know they’re worth fighting for. Amongst the assortment of items that will be buried at random are packed Collector’s Chests, Chests of Legends, suites of Siren Gems and even Chest of Fortunes – so this is a spicy game of loot roulette that stands to swipe you scores of cold hard gold. Finally: even after the community have hit Grade Five, we’ll continue to periodically drop Pop-Up Plunder into the world until the end of the event – just because we can. And, while the vast majority of the loot drops will be at random, the only guaranteed Pop-Up Plunder item will be Grade Five’s treasure, which you’ll all recognise as an item particularly rare and Wondrous. Don’t expect that particular challenge to be an easy task, however. These sorts of ultra-rare treasures can only be handed in at certain spots, so it’s fair to assume that you may have to run a daunting oceanic gauntlet to cash in your prize… Our Onus Is On Bonuses It’s not all precarious pillaging with Pop-Up Plunder – there’s plenty on offer for those of you who just want to enjoy the good vibes of a Community Weekend and score some free stuff. As is customary, the glorious Season Nine Community Weekend flag, in regal tones of purple and gold, will magic its way into the flag boxes of all logging in over the event period. Season Nine Community Weekend also very good news if you’re a fan of fondling foliage, as the Touch Grass Emote will be available for all those logging in during the event period too! While we don’t actually want you to touch any grass during the event – ideally, we want you playing Sea of Thieves – we figured it’d come in handy for those moments of heightened emotion, where you feel like it could be quite refreshing to remind yourself of your roots.
H1gh Voltage
Presenting: Pop-Up Plunder It’s not just the increased rewards and more Twitch Drops you stand to benefit from as you race through the different Community Emissary Grades. Every time the community collectively levels up, we’ll introduce a new piece of Pop-Up Plunder to every single server of Sea of Thieves. But what is Pop-Up Plunder, we hear you cry? Well, we can answer that for you right now: it’s a way for us to sneak terrific treasures into the world on the fly. And if you think that sounds cool, it’s because it is. Every time Pop-Up Plunder becomes available, players will receive a notification in-game that fresh loot is live and that a clue regarding the whereabouts of the high-value haul has been released somewhere to Sea of Thieves’ official social media channels. There will only be one plunderous prize per server, and each will only be discoverable for an hour before it disappears – so you’ll have to be swift on social and on sea to secure your stash. However it’s not all the dreamy pirate’s life, as there’s a certain amount of strife involved in the retrieval of these special stashes of loot. Once the Pop-Up Plunder in question has been dug up, a cheeky little map marker will appear for everyone else sailing on the same sea – just so they know the precious prize hasn’t been handed in yet and they can still steal it. If you’re thinking, ‘well, that sounds dastardly’ – you’re right. We designed it like that, because we are dastardly. You’re welcome. Of course, if we’re suggesting that you might need to scrap to hold onto these spoils, it’s because we know they’re worth fighting for. Amongst the assortment of items that will be buried at random are packed Collector’s Chests, Chests of Legends, suites of Siren Gems and even Chest of Fortunes – so this is a spicy game of loot roulette that stands to swipe you scores of cold hard gold. Finally: even after the community have hit Grade Five, we’ll continue to periodically drop Pop-Up Plunder into the world until the end of the event – just because we can. And, while the vast majority of the loot drops will be at random, the only guaranteed Pop-Up Plunder item will be Grade Five’s treasure, which you’ll all recognise as an item particularly rare and Wondrous. Don’t expect that particular challenge to be an easy task, however. These sorts of ultra-rare treasures can only be handed in at certain spots, so it’s fair to assume that you may have to run a daunting oceanic gauntlet to cash in your prize… Our Onus Is On Bonuses It’s not all precarious pillaging with Pop-Up Plunder – there’s plenty on offer for those of you who just want to enjoy the good vibes of a Community Weekend and score some free stuff. As is customary, the glorious Season Nine Community Weekend flag, in regal tones of purple and gold, will magic its way into the flag boxes of all logging in over the event period. Season Nine Community Weekend also very good news if you’re a fan of fondling foliage, as the Touch Grass Emote will be available for all those logging in during the event period too! While we don’t actually want you to touch any grass during the event – ideally, we want you playing Sea of Thieves – we figured it’d come in handy for those moments of heightened emotion, where you feel like it could be quite refreshing to remind yourself of your roots.
H1gh Voltage 12/09/2023 9:52 AM
And where else to show off your new emote, than in front of a stunning Community Weekend-themed picture wall? Off the back of the popularity of our Anniversary Community Weekend picture wall, we’re bringing back event picture walls to the Sea of Thieves! Except but this time we’re adding them at every Outpost, so you won’t need to trek to Port Merrick to snap your perfect selfie. The new style of wall will also have a flag that represents the Community Emissary Grade at that given time too, so you’ll know how at a glance how Grade progression is going. We’ve even managed to squeeze in a functional grog barrel to the scene, so pirates won’t have to travel far for a celebratory beverage. We’ll cheers to that! For those of you wanting to very literally fly the Season Nine Community Weekend flag at home, you’re in luck – as we’ve got a beautiful time-limited flag and t-shirt heading to the Rare merchandise store for the duration of the weekend. And if any of you folks are looking for an excuse to pick up some additional pirate goodies at a bargain price, the discount code SOTCOMMUNITYWEEKEND will knock off 30% of the cost to an array of Sea of Thieves swag in that very same store, so it’s worth browsing their digital aisles now to see if there are cute items you’d like to earmark for the occasion. Even though Twitter will no longer power our Community Emissary Grade, we’ll still have a big focus on the #SeaOfThievesCommunityWeekend hashtag for fun stories and stunning screenshots, artwork and gameplay clips – so please make sure you spend some time sharing the good vibes on all the usual social media channels. Our Community team will be captaining the channels all throughout the weekend, ready to retweet our favourite posts! Our Community events have always served as a super opportunity to spotlight some of our community’s MVPs. So, if you think either you or one of your crewmates deserves fame and a particularly fetching hat, look no further as #BeMorePirate returns in a supercharged fashion for Community Weekend. It’s our favourite opportunity to celebrate our amazing artists, players, creators and community good eggs – so as is customary, we’ll be scouring our channels and the #BeMorePirate hashtag for amazing Sea of Thieves stories, from now until the end of the event. Worthy winners will be awarded the Hat of Unfeasibly Glorious Fame, so get your submissions in soon to see if your antics warrant your pirate’s bonce being crowned with such a special bonnet. Glove In The First Degree Fashion-focused freebooters, you’re also in luck – it’s time to return to the catwalk for a bonus round of #StyleOfThieves! With just one category to dress for, we’re calling your whole crew into the spotlight this time, with the theme Crew Couture. Show off your cohesive looks or represent your roles on the ship with a screenshot, and you and up to three crewmates could each win a set of Fashionista’s Finery Gloves! Submissions will open 10am UTC October 1st and run for just 24 hours, with the four winning crews being revealed by October 6th. Post your screenshot during the submission window using #StyleOfThieves and the theme title on Twitter, Instagram, and our Official Discord server via the Pirate Fashion Channel, or reply to the #StyleOfThieves Facebook post to enter. Herd Community The most important thing you need to do to prepare for the Season Nine Community Day is contact your crew – or, if you’re a lone wolf, mark some time in your diary for a serious bit of solo Sloopin’. Check your Reputation tabs, your Commendations and our Outpost stocks to see what sorts of targets you can set your sights on, and plot a course for adventure alongside all our other wonderful pirates in this celebration of Sea of Thieves’ super community! We can’t wait to see you on the seas.

j0toro 27/09/2023 12:51 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends It has come to our attention there seems misinformation spreading around the community regarding Safer Seas. After some investigation into the source of this misinformation, we've traced at least some of the initial seeds of this back to creator videos. We want to clarify here: we have not made any comment about how servers will be set up for Safer Seas, nor have we discussed how they will work - so seeing comments around how they will absolutely be 'client side' or 'peer-to-peer' is causing confusion from our players. It's also confusing us, because this is incorrect. Please be conscious that the information you put out there influences our players and can cause a lot of unnecessary conversation and swirl about particular hot topics. Our community looks up to you all as trusted creators who are more in-the-know than most, which is how we've seen an incorrect assumption understood by many as the truth - which is causing a headache for us internally. Because we do not comment on infrastructure externally, it's made even harder for us to correct this false information - because to do so, we'd then have to discuss internal systems. If you have any questions about how Safer Seas servers might work, please ask us. It's likely we can answer your question, but depending on the answer we may ask you not to share this outside of the Creator server - but nevertheless, we're only ever a ping away and would be much happier answering what we can than having to firefight a particularly frustrating and incorrect narrative born out of a misunderstanding.

Christina 23/10/2023 3:31 PM
Hello,@Affiliate @Partners and @Partner Legends Off the back of community feedback around Season Ten's launch, we're making some immediate changes to improve player experience right now - and you can read about these changes right here: https://www.seaofthieves.com/community/forums/topic/162392/season-ten-state-of-play-update/ We'll be communicating these changes wider than the Forums shortly (we're just finalising the language we want to use about this on social media), but wanted to give you a heads up re what we're doing.
Season Ten - State of Play Update
The essential pirate experience from Rare, packed to the seams with sailing and exploring, fighting and plundering, riddle solving and treasure hunting!

Sonicbob (Drew) 25/10/2023 12:47 AM
Hey @Affiliate @Partners @Partner Legends - Following on from this post https://discord.com/channels/550315686636027908/625611888956276736/1166036304811790417 i wanted to drop a quick update. The reduction in Ship and Player limits have had a positive impact in reducing the severity of the performance issues, however we can still see many servers under strain and adversely affected. The team have a strong lead now on both the root cause of the Server Performance issues and the Cannon Firing bug, we'll be getting fixes into testing asap and then expedite into Live as soon as we can in advance of the next scheduled update. Once we have a clear release plan defined we'll share this information wider, but for now i wanted to fire a quick heads up as i know you are all dealing with the discourse in your communities. Appreciate also that there are open topics awaiting a response in other areas of balancing and fixes, but right now we are focusing on stabilising the experience and will then share updates on the other topics. (edited)

H1gh Voltage 26/10/2023 1:32 PM
Hey @Partners, @Partner Legends and @Affiliate Cosmetic Prizes will be processed today at 26/10/2023 6:00 PM. Please make sure to complete your submissions on time and double-check the gamertags where possible!
Sonicbob (Drew) 26/10/2023 6:57 PM
Hey @Affiliate @Partners @Partner Legends - Dropping a further quick update here. Today a server hotfix began to roll out in Live which delivered two improvements. The first was a fix to a vulnerability that allowed bad actors to affect the stability of a server and cause others to be disconnected, and the second was a fix to the now dubbed 'Cannon Sploot'... (Players failing to fire from Cannons). This will rollout over time as new servers spin up, but has been making it's way out during the day. The team are now preparing a further client hotfix for early next week to address further issues we've trapped and fixed. This will include Server Performance improvements, Skull of Destiny Voyage returning to the shipwright with price rollback, Guild Distinction Emissary Flag fix along with some smaller bug fixes. We'll assess how this update lands in Live before we commit to any changes RE Ship and Player limit and whether further hotfixes may be necessary as we approach November's update. On the balancing side, the team are in the weeds assessing the balancing of Combat and Guild progression right now, so while i don't have further updates to share the team have the feedback and are assessing where we may need to make changes. As before please don't share this update verbatim, but rather use the knowledge of the actions were taking behind the scenes, hopefully gives you all confidence that the team are working hard to get us back to a stable state. Appreciate your patience and support as we're working through these areas - I'm confident we can bring some stability back to the experience here soon!

j0toro 30/10/2023 1:37 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate Custom Servers had been affected by the 5 ship change but we are now reverting this meaning you can once again get 6 ships on a server. Please be aware though that if you try to get 6 gallys on a server you're going to have a bad time in terms of perf so we would advise all events be done on sloops and brigs, ideally with support ships as sloops to try and give a better player experience. Please also note this will take a few days to kick in. (edited)

j0toro 4/12/2023 3:56 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate After thorough internal investigations the team are confident that there is some odd behaviour taking place when players are in tunnels for hourglass that affects the fill rate of ships when they take holes in battle. These investigations have shown that this is *not * linked to cooking. While we will not be making a public statement on this, we know you have been seeing noise around this and you keep cooking 2 pieces of meat so stop it! It's not doing anything. Further to this, we will be continuing our investigations and work will continue in this area as we work towards a fix to protect the integrity of hourglass mode. (edited)

We have a LOT of great things planned for next year and super excited to have Sam on board with us! Sam is awesome, so be nice to him and behave, please. I'm still here and I'll be watching

j0toro 12/12/2023 10:22 AM
Gooood morning @Partners @Partner Legends and @Affiliate! @beckyfr0st and I are currently figuring out interest in our Gameblast 24 stream for February. This will be a fairly simple (she says!) set-up with slots assigned to the Rare team, Partners, Affiliate communities and smaller streamers delivering a variety of content showcasing all that SoT has to offer over the course of 24 hours. The dates for our Gameblast stream will be Saturday, 24 February 2024 12:00:00 PM until Sunday, 25 February 2024 12:00:00 PM. However, as we have limited slots for the 24 hour stream, we will also be creating a Stream Team from the start of February - this will allow you to fundraise over the month, raising money for SpecialEffect and will all go into one big donation pot from the SoT community. It's our hope to get enough of you involved that we can not only raise a tonne of money for good cause, but also knock SEGA off their Gameblast throne. Planning will start properly int he new year but for now please can you react with if you're interested in the stream and if you're interested in the stream team. You can do both! SpecialEffect: https://www.specialeffect.org.uk/ (edited)
Gaming Charity Supporting the Physically Disabled | SpecialEffect

Caliburn 21/12/2023 10:43 AM
Hey all @Partners, @Partner Legends and @Affiliate. As we're heading into the holidays, we're going to begin processing Cosmetic Prizes today. If you haven't already sorted yours please get them in by Friday, 22 December 2023 9:00 AM and I'll take another look tomorrow. Feel free to DM me whenever if you have any questions and otherwise have a great holiday if you're celebrating. (side note: if I don't reply feel free to poke me, chances are it's lost in the magical realm of Discord message requests...) (edited)

Caliburn 4/01/2024 11:18 AM
Hey all @Partners, @Partner Legends and @Affiliate - Happy New Year! I’m going to begin processing Cosmetic Prizes today but as I know lot of you are coming back from holidays, catching up on things and whatever else I’ll also take another look tomorrow morning. If you haven't already sorted yours please get them in by Friday, 5 January 2024 9:00 AM ! Hope you had a lovely break along with some fun holiday streams, as before feel free to DM me whenever if you have any questions or need any help with anything (Beardly that includes PC hardware if I have time). I’ll also continue to pop in when people are live to try and get to know your content and hear all of your Christmas tree related complaints. P.S. Aware some are struggling with One Drive, if that includes you please let me know. I'll ask for which mail you've got it on and try removing/readding you since it's clearly haunted.

j0toro 18/01/2024 3:37 PM
@Partner Legends @Partners @Affiliate

GAMEBLAST 24

We will be announcing our Gameblast 24 Stream Team sign-ups tonight as part of the Gameblast stream with Special Effect. I will be asking people to reach out to Becky or myself via Twitter. THIS DOESN'T APPLY TO YOU - JUST DM ME ON DISCORD! The way the Stream Team works is you join our Charity Team and can raise money for Special Effect throughout February. This means you're not limited to having to do it over Gameblast weekend (23rd - 25th Feb). While we are also working on how to highlight some of you as part of a stream internally, please be open to the stream team as an option so we can do as much good as possible for an incredible charity. You have the platforms to do a lot of good. We are also working on a Stream Team webpage which will highlight our Stream Team to try and boost our Creator Crew members, increase views on the category and boost those donations to beat SEGA https://www.specialeffect.org.uk/ https://www.specialeffect.org.uk/gameblast

j0toro 21/03/2024 9:20 AM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate With PS5 release drawing closer we wanted to take the time to explain a few things. Firstly, we can not guarantee anyone here a code for the game on PS5 platform. If you would like to guarantee the preorder bonuses etc then please preorder the game via the store. Secondly the Ruby Viper cosmetics will not be handed out - it has been our stance for 2+ years now that we will not hand out items that have not been earned. Thirdly, the Ruby Viper set can only be used on PS5 so if you are pre-ordering the game then be aware that in order to show off these items you must be playing on the PS5 version of the game, they can not be equipped on PC, Xbox.

This information is not to be shared.

The following are confirmed as platform exclusive Can not be used on Playstation
  • Duke Ship Set
  • Black Dog Set
Can only be used on Playstation
  • Ruby Viper Weapons
  • Dauntless Adventurer Sails
  • Parakeet
We will most likely communicate to players via the FAQ we are working on. (edited)

6
Caliburn 28/03/2024 2:45 PM
Hey @Partners @Partner Legends and @Affiliate folks. I’ll sort cosmetic rewards tomorrow, Friday, 29 March 2024 9:00:00 AM, first though something beyond cosmetics and drops I’ve got a few things for you all to think about. I’ve been speaking to all the folks at Rare about how to make it more rewarding to be here with us partnered on Sea of Thieves and as an initial result I’ve got a couple of requests for you:
  • For everyone both partners and affiliate alliance, please if you’re planning something cool whether it’s an event you’re hosting, a particularly spicy co-stream, long awaited video series or whatever else – come have a chat with me in advance. I’ll be looking for ways we can more actively promote it or what we can do to help from our side to make it better.
  • For all partners, I’m looking for a few people who like cooking with more depth than the hello fresh stuff I’ve seen a few of you do. If that sounds like you come say hi, need 10-20 of you, first come first served.
  • Finally, all partners please take 5 minutes to log in to the website and make sure your details are up to date such as current address, email etc. Nothing major going on at the moment but I’d like to explore our options for the future. New and interesting ways, right? (IF THIS DOESNT WORK DON'T WORRY WE WON'T LET SPREADSHEETS STOP US. I'LL FIGHT THE JANK FOR YOU aka probably dm and i'll do it by hand)
We’re also working to get a support-a-streamer campaign off the ground with Twitch around the Season 12 launch, which for anyone unfamiliar will give rewards to people subscribing to channels streaming Sea of Thieves. Consider this an initial heads up for if you’d like to adjust your calendars or organise some collabs amongst yourselves, I’m told this can be quite a big gain for creators such as yourselves financially. Obligatory reminder that none of this is currently public knowledge or ready to be shared so please keep it under wraps for now. (edited)

Caliburn 28/03/2024 3:11 PM
Also - minor add on behald of my new friends in the social team - a lot of the time we see cool clips but can't share them because they're full of bad words. If you're aiming for us to share something keep in mind the game's age rating, anything that gets promo'd on our account needs to be cool with that (that's an industry wide rule before you complain).
20
Caliburn 5/04/2024 9:06 AM
Hey @Partners @Partner Legends and @Affiliate folks, I’ll sort cosmetic rewards later today at Friday, 5 April 2024 12:00:00 PM Important other stuff:
  • Partners, I’ve got a few more spots for Sea of Thieves cooking related content – if you think streaming/recording yourself cooking sounds fun then get in touch, I’ve got ~5 more spots and my DMs are open.
  • If you’re an older partner, please check if you can log in at https://www.seaofthieves.com/partner-signup-form - if you can’t, when you have a few minutes spare please sign up again. This will create a profile that you can edit with your address, channel info etc. Poke me when you have, and I can purge the old data and accept the new one. It’ll help me with any opportunities that come up and getting the partner directory up to date once the new website is finished.
  • Yes you can stream the PS5 Beta, please make it clear that it’s the beta though. Footage can linger for quite a while from my experience and people tend to think it’s still indicative of the final product.

Caliburn 11/04/2024 1:45 PM
Hey @Partners @Partner Legends and @Affiliate
  • I'll do cosmetic rewards for this week at Friday, 12 April 2024 9:00:00 AM so try and get them in by then!
Other stuff:
  • If I spoke to you about a cooking thing the embargo on that is Tuesday, 7 May 2024 . I'll poke you individually to say the same but just a heads up to keep it a secret until then.
  • Twitch creators: Support A Streamer is currently expected between Tuesday, 30 April 2024 - Sunday, 19 May 2024 but might shuffle a little if the season itself slips.
  • Older partners, there's still plenty of you that need an up to date profile - do that here by signing up as if you're new then poke me to accept it: https://www.seaofthieves.com/partner-signup-form
  • If you're creating things on TikTok and hitting our partner requirements there (or close to) I'd love to hear from you for something...

1
Caliburn 12/04/2024 2:30 PM
Attention Twitch folks @Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate . Due to some unfortunate technical issues we’ve had to delay Support A Streamer, we’re now looking at doing it for the S13 launch (and I’ll confirm with you all ASAP). I appreciate this is pretty disappointing, as the best make good I can do we’re going to give you each 10x Guilded Phoenix ship sets (the entire set, all platforms not just twitch) to give away over the S12 release month and we’re going to adjust the drops date to coincide with release. I encourage you to do events such as subathons with them and I assure you Support A Streamer isn’t dead, it’ll be back. If you have an idea you’re worried might bump into our guidelines on paywalling things, feel free to reach out. Also, professionalism hat aside - this sucks and I’m sorry. (edited)

@Partner Legends @Partners @Affiliate In case you missed it: Our team have been monitoring the PlayStation®5 Closed Beta and have identified an issue matchmaking players onto servers, resulting in long wait times. The team are working to mitigate this issue as best as we can, however this may continue to affect players over the weekend. Head to the forums for more information on the issue and thank you all for your patience - we're doing everything we can to get you all onto the seas! https://www.seaofthieves.com/community/forums/topic/167849/playstation-5-closed-beta-update-on-matchmaking-delays/1

1
H1gh Voltage 3/05/2024 8:58 AM
Hey @Partners and @Partner Legends I'm excited to announce that we have partnered with Lurkit and launched our Creator Programme there just a couple days ago. We plan to use this new platform to reach out to and engage with more content creators. We'd also love to explore Lurkit's handy tools to launch quests and promotional campaigns for anyone who is either busy making SoT content already or might be interested in doing so on a special occasion or for the right reward. This will not in any way replace the way we run Partner or Variety Programmes or change our existing process of onboarding new creators. Think of it more like a new layer on top that will help us grow and manage things a little quicker, hopefully We highly encourage all of you to join so you don't miss out on any of our future activities there. All you have to do is just click one of the buttons to apply on our Lurkit page and I'll get you in asap with no extra checks or reviews: https://www.lurkit.com/company/sea-of-thieves-creator-programme Please let me know if you have any questions! (edited)
Sea of Thieves Creator Programme | Lurkit
Sea of Thieves offers the essential pirate experience, packed to the seams with sailing and exploring, fighting and plundering, riddle solving and treasure hunting – everything you need to live the pirate life you’ve always dreamed about. With no set roles, you have complete freedom to approach the world, and other players, however you choose.

j0toro 13/06/2024 9:37 AM
@Partners @Creator Team @Affiliate @Partner Legends Just to clarify some things around the Emporium Extravaganza. As you are currently under NDA and receive monthly perks and benefits from us, you are NOT eligible to win the competition. This is because under FTC, Microsoft and other guidelines you are classified as affiliates. The same is also applicable to our Quartermasters and Deckhands. We are also aware that many of you may already own everything in the Emporium so unless you buy a lot of renaming deeds you can't get the new trinket. Because of this we will be adding the trinket to your accounts. Please don't draw attention to this other than you have spent the required money, which you all likely have given the AC we give you.

MAINTENANCE [22.08.24]

NOT TO BE COMMUNICATED

Comms on tomorrow's build are delayed until the build is signed off this afternoon. Tomorrow's maintenance will be slightly longer than usual due to some behind the scenes changes that have to be made during downtime. Current ETA is 1:00 PM/2:00 PM I'm only letting you know in case you have streams planned so you're not sat waiting for 3-4 hours. Fingers crossed it doesn't take that long but best to plan for it doing so. (edited)

Caliburn 27/08/2024 10:57 AM
@Partners @Partner Legends Today we’re announcing a change to Partner Rewards effective beginning with next month (aka September). We wanted to spice things up with some variety and recognise that there’s a lot of new Sea of Thieves players post-PlayStation era that haven’t had a chance to earn certain things. To reflect this, your rolling rewards will be changed to the following:
  • 5x Plunder Pass per season
  • 3x The Serpent’s Lie Sails per month
  • 3x Gilded Phoenix Ship Sets per month Additionally, it’s an open secret we’d like to support more activations alongside our partners, this could be stoking the fires of a tournament you’ve got in the works, a particularly special video that requires beyond normal levels of effort, a charity event where we can incentivise your audience to help make a difference… The list is none exhaustive and as I said before I want to hear about it. Today we’re doubling down. Outside of the above rolling reward structure, you’ll notice a new channel ( #partner-event-requests ) allowing you to submit a short form requesting additional rewards to support something special – as the kids say, it’s time to ‘let you cook’.

If you're thinking 'would this idea i had qualify...' just ask.

j0toro 11/09/2024 3:02 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate State of Play: https://www.seaofthieves.com/community/forums/topic/173314/commitment-to-player-safety-state-of-play Tweet to amplify should you wish to: https://x.com/SeaOfThieves/status/1833883632563257540
Commitment to Player Safety - State of Play
The essential pirate experience from Rare, packed to the seams with sailing and exploring, fighting and plundering, riddle solving and treasure hunting!
Sea of Thieves (@SeaOfThieves) on X
Given a recent rise of reports regarding malicious actors, we wanted to provide an update on our ongoing commitment to player safety. Please read this official Forum post on the current state of play, as well as news of some upcoming changes in this area: https://t.co/qRKvsgY5Hm
Twitter • 11/09/2024 3:01 PM
10
Caliburn 12/09/2024 2:16 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate Cosmetic prizes will be rewarded Friday, 13 September 2024 3:00:00 PM. Additionally, for Partners and Partner Legends, I’m working with the folks in Player Support on rolling out something to assist with recent cheating woes – we’re aiming to let each of you have one nominated moderator who’d have the same weighting on reports as you meaning they can post tickets on your behalf whilst you’re mid-stream. Try and think of your most trustworthy mod in the meantime and I’ll work with the lovely folks in Player Support on speeding this up. TL;DR Coming Soon™. Finally, I appreciate there’s been some game health woes recently, I’m always a major advocate for all of you speaking on these topics freely, that said I would prefer to have more discussions with you here than feel your frustrations through a tweet (even if it feels justified at times…). If you ever want to poke me for an opinion, an update, to let me know something’s not right or whatever else I’m here to have those conversations too not just hear things about the good times – that’s where recent rewards changes and the above idea came from. To be blunt I’m here to advocate on your behalf so please talk to me.

Caliburn 19/09/2024 2:07 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends Reposting this here too: https://discord.com/channels/550315686636027908/968542324827258950/1286316219783319637 Please keep in mind that in your #code-of-conduct as a partner it clearly states: • Do not discuss or showcase exploits If a game mechanic is not working as it is obviously intended to then you should not be discussing or showcasing it to your community. If you are unsure then avoid it on stream and raise it (via the website) with our support team who will investigate and get back to you. If there's any doubt about this or you need guidance on a specific instance, please reach out to me or another member of staff. Again, very much a help me/us to help you situation.

Sonicbob (Drew) 20/09/2024 11:17 AM
Hey @Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate - We'll be taking the game down this afternoon for emergency maintenance [13:00 UTC, 20th September 2024] to address the critical issues identified in yesterday's update. TL;DR - Fishing Rod Fixes today (to ALL of the various scenarios), follow up Hotfix next week for further fixes. For a more broader update though, check out the latest State of Play which is now public; https://www.seaofthieves.com/community/forums/post/1951302 You can all see how candid I've been in this post, we recognise the quality of this update was just not good enough and we have some work here to go and improve. This won't happen overnight, but we have to work towards getting back in control of the game quality - I've seen your feedback on this across the programme recently and it's been sparking conversations internally already. Appreciate your support here as always! Feel free to discuss further in #ask-rare-2-electric-boogaloo and i'll try and answer what i can while in and out of things.
September 19th Update - State of Play
The essential pirate experience from Rare, packed to the seams with sailing and exploring, fighting and plundering, riddle solving and treasure hunting!

H1gh Voltage 25/09/2024 3:41 PM
Hey @Partners, @Partner Legends, @Affiliate We have now completely moved the application process for Partner and Variety Programmes to Lurkit and updated the information on our website. What changes for existing Partners and Variety creators: Nothing much, all you need to do is apply to our Creator Programme there (if you haven't already) and DM me, so I can get you in right away - https://www.lurkit.com/company/sea-of-thieves-creator-programme This will ensure you are included in our list of affiliated creators and are able to participate in any special Lurkit-exclusive activities we are planning in the future. This Discord Server will remain our main platform for communication, latest updates, feedback, collabs and many other things. Lurkit is meant to streamline our application process, reach out to new creators and run campaigns rewarding SoT content creation on top of all existing perks. What it means for new creators who would like to join: They will no longer have to fill in the old form and will have to create or log in to their Lurkit account to apply instead. Great news is that Lurkit does the majority of tedious but necessary checks for us automatically, which improves application processing time from our side. We won't have to dig for hidden gems through hundreds of (mostly random or unrelated) submitted forms anymore, and creators will find out about the decision on their applications much quicker. What about those who applied just before we closed the old form? There are about two hundred submissions in our backlog awaiting the decision at the moment. Their applications are safely stored in our system and we'll prioritise reviewing their channels first in the next couple of weeks. Other Lurkit things worth highlighting:
  • We have a game key giveaway campaign active and running, so if you know a creator who maybe wanted to give SoT a try, but was stopped by a price tag - feel free to send them this link - https://www.lurkit.com/campaigns/1b99-sea-of-thieves. We review and usually approve the keys in bulk 2-3 times a week.
  • Lurkit has plenty of tools to run missions, quests and custom campaigns to engage and reward creators and we are excited to use them all for you, Creator Crew and general marketing activities in the future. We are cooking something already, just need to figure out the reward system and schedule.
If you run into any issues while using Lurkit: Please reach out to their support on support@lurkit.com or use their knowledge base to find quick answers to the most common questions https://support.lurkit.com/. As always, feel free to dm me if you have any questions. (edited)

H1gh Voltage 14/10/2024 12:40 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends Since I can't fix the problem with access to prize request results until Caliburn is back, please feel free to DM me gamertags of your Season 13 Plunder Pass winners from last week (5th-13th Oct) asap and I will make sure they get them before Season 14 launches. Otherwise, your winners will just get new Season 14 Plunder Pass (along with all the other cosmetics you submitted) when Caliburn is back from holidays. Again, sorry for the inconvenience! Would be much easier to just wait until the end of the week, but I know that there are many people who want to claim premium cosmetics from S13 Pass specifically. 2
Sonicbob (Drew) 15/10/2024 10:59 AM
Hey @Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate
  • Jumping in here to share a little update on the ellusive Mimic Dart you've no doubt seen teased at the Outposts recently.
The Mimic dart will allow players to temporarily hide in plain sight and confuse their opponents by taking on the appearance of another player or skeleton in the world. As the team moved through production on Season 14 this part of the Blowpipe's arsenal was deprioritised so we could build confidence in other areas. We see so much value in the stories this tool could create that instead of descoping it from the Season, we instead made the call to delay its launch. The Mimic Dart will therefore not be available at Season 14's launch but will be arriving later in the season, with our target being our December update. Appreciate there has been lots of speculation on this feature since it began being teased at the Outpost and hadn't yet arrived in Insiders for testing. We will communicate this on the launch of Season 14 in the Release Notes, but you are free to use your channels to communicate that;
  • The Mimic Dart is still being worked on
  • The team made the call to prioritise hardening other areas of the Seasons feature set for launch
  • Will not be available for Season 14 Launch and will arrive later in the Season Appreciate you've all been holding your tongues on this one, so feel free to share this news with your communities when asked and confirm that we'll share more on this feature soon.
Any questions, feel free to shout me in #ask-rare-2-electric-boogaloo
20
Sonicbob (Drew) 16/10/2024 11:43 AM
Hey @Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate - It's me, back again! As we've been closing down the build for launch on Thursday we've seen enough signals that the Hanging from Ledges feature is not currently stable enough to ship right now. We are therefore temporarily disabling Hanging From Ledges for launch and will enable it as part of a post-launch hotfix once we've addressed known stability issues and regained shipping confidence. As a result however this does mean that a number of Commendations, Achievements/Trophies and Rewards will be unobtainable at launch. We'll be communicating this as part of the Season 14 Patch Notes going live tomorrow, and there'll be a supporting KBA on the Support Site that gets amplified by our channels. We're sharing this with you all in advance so you are aware and prepared, however consider this information NDA Confidential until we share the news ourselves. What i want to share also here though is that while it's always painful for us to have to delay a feature especially with it's knock on impact to other areas, i champion the teams call here to focus on the player experience at launch and to put our hands up and hold on something that just isn't ready. Reviewing the signals from Internal testing and Insiders reports, this feature set has the indicators to generate instability and bugs to the wider experience and I'm happy to make a pragmatic proactive decision to hold here rather than a reactive apology later down the line. Appreciate your support here come launch tomorrow, reinforcing this approach and reminding players we'll be working hard to get this part of the feature set in players hands as soon as possible. Again, any questions feel free to shout me in #ask-rare-2-electric-boogaloo
7
5
2
Sonicbob (Drew) 17/10/2024 1:05 PM
Hey @Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate - They say news always comes in three's... The irony of my last update isn't yet lost on me, however today we find ourselves in a similar situation however this time with Traps. While we were on a path to shipping Traps with a known issue today we've seen the impact area of this problem open up and reach a level that will impact regular play, particularly in player to player encounters on ships. I know this is now the second of our Season features to come under the quality spotlight, however we've made the difficult call to temporarily disable Traps alongside Hanging from Ledges from Season 14 launch today. We have similar impact here with a number of Commendations, Achievements/Trophies and Rewards being unobtainable at launch. We will launch with this communicated as part of the Season 14 Patch Notes going live, and supporting KBA on the Support Site. I'm also going to get a proactive State of Play update to the forums to explain the issues and the decisions we've taken here to better inform our players on why we've made these tough calls. Again - sharing this with you all in advance so you are aware and prepared, however consider this information NDA Confidential again until we share the news ourselves. Appreciate your support as always and i know you'll be equally disappointed at losing some value from the season at launch but understand the reasons we've made this decision. Any questions feel free to shout me in #ask-rare-2-electric-boogaloo

Caliburn 15/11/2024 1:05 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends Cosmetic Prizes later today, Friday, 15 November 2024 4:00:00 PM
Caliburn 15/11/2024 4:09 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate Ahoy dear scallywags! As we head into the winter season, we wanted to give the year a proper send off and something unique for everyone here to get into the holiday spirit. You’ve likely got at least some idea of the Festival of Giving but today we’re happy to announce two additional initiatives which will run concurrently from the 6th – 22nd of December, starting and finishing at 10am UTC. So without further preamble… Support A Streamer: For all the folks on Twitch eligible for viewer subscriptions, we’ve been told by the team at Twitch this is a big one. During the above dates, if viewers buy or gift any combination of subscriptions to channels in the Sea of Thieves category they will be eligible for the following rewards:
  • Celestial Steed Ship Cosmetics - 2 subs (Note: SHIP COSMETICS ONLY)
  • Obsidian Capstan - 3 subs
They’ve also kindly let us join the list of cool kids tapping into their new method of running Support A Streamer, so it’ll utilise the same reward system as our existing drops campaigns making it multiplatform and as simple to claim rewards as it is with drops (also requiring the same account linking). There'll be a page with relevant info linking this along with an announcement in the near future.
11
1
2
1
4
1
4:10 PM
Holiday Hauls: The Gift Giver Sails will be temporarily granted to all Creators, Affiliate Alliance, and Deckhands for you to hoist at your discretion indicating you have the following goodies to gift to lucky pirates as you deem fit as long as there is no monetary barrier to entry. Items to giveaway: (Requirement is no paywalls)
  • 30x Emote Bundles (Emotes: Pay Respects, Let's Go!, Feeling Sad)
  • 5x Obsidian Six Packs
  • 5x Rising Morning Star Sets
  • + Double your usual monthly rewards (e.g. instead of 3x The Serpent’s Lie Sails you will have 6 for December) The method for giving this stuff away is deliberately a bit loose to cater for all of the different types of creative here but I want to stress this part: ABSOLUTELY NO PAY WALLS for the above, if you have an idea you’re unsure about ask a member of staff. If I find somebody puts any kind of monetary requirement on holiday gifts I’m firing you out of whatever program and straight into the sun.

Caliburn 5/12/2024 1:27 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate IMPORTANT POST PLEASE ACTUALLY READ THIS Holiday Hauls: Please make sure to turn the sails off when you are not personally on the ship, do not leave them on and let your guildmates sail it for example. This will cause a lot of problems and confusion we’d like to avoid; let’s all try and have a nice event. Get into the habit of toggling them off when you’re not personally on the ship and looking for interactions related to this event. Do not leave them on the ship at other times. Disable them before logging off for the day. If you don't understand this clearly please ask. Imagine this is in giant capital letters flashing with a police siren or something. The rewards will be added to the Cosmetic Prize form so please submit them there as you would with regular rewards. You’ll also get all the rewards granted to your main accounts so there’s no need for you to put your own name down for any of them. Support A Streamer: The web page for this is live here: https://www.seaofthieves.com/support-a-streamer Just to clarify though since it keeps coming up, 3 subs total gets all the rewards. Finally, Cosmetic Prizes will be done tomorrow at the usual time Friday, 6 December 2024 4:00:00 PM
Support A Streamer
Support your favorite Sea of Thieves streamer on Twitch and get rewards!
