Caliburn 13/12/2024 12:09 PM
@everyone Important PSA for all creators. It’s been flagged to me that some creators recent use of VODs for re-runs when taking an extended break or otherwise not live for a long period. After raising this with Twitch we’ve been advised that this goes against the site’s ToS and should be avoided. To quote directly from Twitch:
Taking a break is ok (toilet, lunch etc) but we can’t do “will be back shortly in 10hrs” I would have admins fill the inactive periods or simply go offline as anyone can report the channel during these prolonged away times. We police VoD channels aimed to to help farm drops pretty harshly. If the VoD didn’t support Drops but was re-run to earn ad revenue, that is up to the separate Fraud team but from what I have seen, the strictness of how they police channels is something I am not sure if it is clear cut
Please assume this PSA supersedes any previous conversations either myself or another member of staff has had with you on this or similar subjects and adjust accordingly. If you have questions, please reach out to me or discuss with your partnership manager at Twitch. Everyone ping for obvious reasons, prefer to keep you all out of trouble. Additional from Twitch support:
VoD reruns are OK, as long as it is not tied to drop farming
 (edited)
9
2

Caliburn 20/12/2024 7:02 PM
@Partners @Partner Legends I'll run Cosmetic Prizes at the start of next week Monday, 23 December 2024 10:00:00 AM to tie up everything holiday hauls and such before the holidays. Most things should be done already as of today though. Reminder about this feedback survey, it's pretty short and I'd like us to get into the habit of running one every now and then to ask how you all feel. Finally, I've been here over a year now, wew that's weird. Big plans for next year though now a lot of groundwork is sorta done. Hope you're excited, have a good break, nothing catches fire, stay out of trouble etcetc. It's been fun for the most part, here's to more.

@Partners @Partner Legends Cosmetic Prizes will be applied later today, Friday, 17 January 2025 4:00:00 PM. As we've got drops running next week, could everyone do us a favour and encourage viewers to link their twitch and sea of thieves accounts to redeem the items fully? Twitch Drops - watch your favourite streamers on Twitch!
There’s nothing a pirate on the Sea of Thieves likes more than free loot – and now, thanks to Twitch Drops, you can claim some just by linking your Twitch account to your Sea of Thieves account and tuning in to watch your favourite streamers!

j0toro 29/01/2025 4:01 PM
@Affiliate @Partners @Partner Legends

GameBlast is just around the corner!

GameBlast is an annual fundraiser for the UK charity SpecialEffect, who are dedicated to levelling the playing field for disabled gamers. They do amazing work, from adaptive controllers to eye tracking, to allow gamers with disabilities to play their favourite games. You can learn more about them at: https://www.specialeffect.org.uk/ Every year we team up with SoT creators to raise money throughout February, culminating in a huge fundraising effort over GameBlast weekend. This year this will be 21st - 23rd February, with fundraising taking place throughout February so it aligns to people's schedules and isn't limited to one weekend, and we'd love you to get involved. As with last year, we have created a Tiltify Team (https://tiltify.com/+rare-ltd/sot-gb25) that can all raise money into one big donation pot for our friends over at Special Effect. All creators taking part will also get to give away a Gilded Phoenix Weapon Set if they raise £100 for SpecialEffect. For those who join up, please make sure you also join the Sea of Thieves Discord server as there is an exclusive GameBlast role and section where you can coordinate with other Gameblasters, streamers and Jo and Becky. We can't wait to see you all join in! Jo and Becky (edited)
Gaming Charity Supporting the Physically Disabled | SpecialEffect
Tiltify - Sea of Thieves GameBlast25
Rare Ltd is fundraising for GameBlast25 on Tiltify
4:01 PM
TLDR: CHARITY! SIGN UP! (edited)

H1gh Voltage 23/02/2025 12:15 PM
@Partners, @Partner Legends, @Affiliate There is a solid chance you may find a surprise in a form of a Seasoned Sailor Eye of Reach in your inventories. Don't worry too much, it's one of the items planned for the upcoming Community Weekend Drops in March. Not sure why it's in your accounts a whole month early and why only this cosmetic out of all other drops, though I'll have a chance to ask around and investigate how it got there on Monday. And for now, please just keep it under wraps, in good (seasoned) condition and don't equip it, especially when you are live or creating content. If you find more oddities in your inventories - please let us know asap. Thanks!

j0toro 25/03/2025 4:42 PM
@everyone

Starting next week we will be overhauling this server to streamline it, secure it and to improve feedback and reporting.

We will be introducing a stunning new bot for reporting.

This Bot MUST be used for reports.

*I will do a how-to next week. * This will have categories for:
  • Bugs
  • Exploits
  • Cheats
  • Guild/ship/pet name
  • Event requests
  • General queries and concerns
*These tickets will be seen ONLY by the Game Support Team. This will keep things cleaner, stop back and forth and, most importantly, secure us from a legal, GDPR and security standpoint as there are no clips and gamertags floating around. * This new system also means that myself, Rare Reaper, Shirah and the new Player Experience Team can EASILY go through this server and report back bugs, issues and exploits without them getting lost in chatter. Once we move over to Universal Codes we MAY add prize allocation to this system as well. Feedback channels will remain:
  • General
  • QoL
  • Feature Specific Again, these are for THOUGHTS not REPORTS!
Almost everything here will be archived and reset to make sure sensitive data is only accessibly by those who need to see it. Obviously, we will not touch the pets channel or announcements etc. All this to say:

Please do not panic when channels start to disappear.

USE THE NEW TICKET SYSTEM.

*Reports not using it WILL be deleted as this is a new security compliance. * Thank you
